151610.desc: Every 6s after the battle starts: this ship gains 1 stack of Poetic Inspiration (can be stacked up 5 times). For each stack, increases this ship's cannon DMG dealt by $1. When gaining the 5th stack, increases this ship's Main Gun Crit Rate by $2, sets her Secondary Guns' Range and Targeting Range to 95, and after the next time she fires her Main Guns, the loading time of her Main Guns decreases by 20.0% until the battle ends.

151620.name: Banquet of a Hundred Verses

151630.name: Steadfast Shiratsuyu
151630.desc:
Increases this ship's AA by $2. While this ship is afloat: decreases your Main Fleet's DMG taken by $1.
When this ship is attacked: 15.0% chance to increase this ship's FP and TRP by $3 until the battle ends (5s cooldown between activations; can be stacked up to 3 times).
When this ship fires her equipped torpedoes: fires a $5 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and the ship in your Main Fleet with the lowest current HP percentage recovers $4 of her max HP; this effect can only activate once every 10s.

151640.name: Span of an Instant
151640.desc: 10s after the battle starts, and every 20s after that: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); when this ship fires her torpedoes: $2 chance to fire a $1 special torpedo barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

151650.name: Momentary Bloom
151650.desc: Increases this ship's FP, TRP, and EVA by $1. While this ship is afloat, increases your CAs' TRP by $1, Torpedo Crit Rate by $2, and SPD by $3.

151660.name: Homemade Mystery Hot Pot

151670.name: Stream Chases Thunder's Traces
151670.desc: Increases this ship's TRP and ACC by $1. Every 20s: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

151680.name: The Best-Laid Plans go Boom!
151680.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. 30s after the battle starts: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

151690.name: Blessings from the Sea!
151690.desc: Decreases this ship's DMG taken by 20.0%. When this ship hits an enemy with the Main Gun weapon in her first Gear Slot: 10.0% chance to decrease that enemy's ACC by $1 for 5s. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores $2 of this ship's max HP.

151700.name: Horror From the Deeps
151700.desc: When this ship enters the battle: every second for 10s, restores $1 of this ship's max HP. 5s after this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken, or 60s after this ship enters the battle: this ship leaves the battlefield.

151710.name: Horror From the Deeps+
151710.desc: When this ship enters the battle: every second for 10s, restores $1 of this ship's max HP and increases this ship's EVA by 1.0% (can be stacked up to 10 times). 5s after this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken, or 60s after this ship enters the battle: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level), then this ship leaves the battlefield.

151720.name: Dreams in the Pirate's House
151720.desc: When this ship enters the battle: every second for 15s, increases this ship's FP and RLD by 1.0% (can be stacked up to 15 times). Every 15s: this ship becomes immobile for 1s and fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); if this barrage sinks an enemy, additionally performs a $1 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level; 15s cooldown between activations; enemies hit by this attack have their SPD decreased by 30.0% for 3s).

151740.name: The Best-Laid Plans go Boom!+
151740.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. 30s after the battle starts: fires an improved $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and increases this ship's DMG dealt by $2 until the battle ends.

151750.name: The Blackmane Tempesta
151750.desc: If this ship is your Flagship: increases your Tempesta ships' FP, ACC, and EVA by $1; if she is not your Flagship: increases this ship's FP and EVA by $2. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $3 chance to fire a $4 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); if there is another Tempesta ship in your fleet, increases this barrage's activation chance by 30.0%.

151760.name: Share the Spoils
151760.desc: When this ship finishes loading her Main Guns, if there is no enemy with Plunder Target on the battlefield, inflicts Plunder Target to a random enemy (prioritizes humanoid enemies); enemies with Plunder Target have $1 decreased EVA and take $1 more DMG from Queen Anne's Revenge. When an enemy with Plunder Target is sunk, all your Tempesta ships recover $2 of their max HP.

151770.name: Pearl of the Sky, Sapphire of the Sea
151770.desc: Increases this ship's FP and RLD by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) that inflicts Pearl Moon to enemies hit. Enemies with Pearl Moon have their ACC decreased by 15.0% until the battle ends (this effect does not stack).

151780.name: Moon's Splendour, Pearl's Shimmer
151780.desc: Every odd-numbered time this ship fires her Main Guns: decreases your Vanguard's DMG taken by $1 for 8s; every even-numbered time she fires her Main Guns: restores $2 of this ship's max HP and inflicts 500 DMG to enemies with the Pearl Moon debuff.

151790.name: Moon's Splendour, Pearl's Shimmer+
151790.desc: Increases this ship's FP and RLD by $1. 30s after the battle starts: increases this ship's DMG dealt by $3 until the battle ends. When this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) that inflicts Pearl Moon to enemies hit. Enemies with Pearl Moon have their ACC decreased by 15.0% until the battle ends (this effect does not stack).

151800.name: Judgment of Spear and Sword
151800.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. Increases this ship's DMG dealt by $2 against enemies with less than 25.0% HP. Every 5s: fires a $3 special shell, and every 20s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG of the shell and the barrage is based on the skill's level).

151810.name: Final Sacrament
151810.desc: When the battle starts: increases this ship's EVA by $1 and deploys a barrier (lasting 30s) that can negate DMG equal to $2 of this ship's max HP. When the battle starts, if there is another Tempesta ship in your fleet: once per battle, when this ship takes DMG that would sink her, this ship does not sink, recovers 10.0% of her max HP, and evades all DMG for 3s; when this effect activates, increases this ship's DMG dealt by 10.0% and decreases her DMG taken by 15.0% until the battle ends.

151960.name: Trend Setter
151960.desc:
When the battle starts: deploys a barrier (lasting 20s) around all your Sakura Empire DDs that can negate DMG equal to $2 of their max HP; while this barrier exists, the recipients' TRP increases by $1; when this barrier expires, or if it is destroyed due to DMG during its active duration, the recipient recovers 4.0% of her max HP.
Once per battle, when this ship takes DMG that would sink her, this ship evades that DMG and the following effect applies: this ship has a 73.0% chance to evade all DMG for 5s; if this effect does not activate, this ship recovers 8.0% of her max HP.

151970.name: Attention Getter
151970.desc: When the battle starts, for every Sakura Empire ship in your fleet: increases this ship's DMG dealt by $1 and RLD and TRP by $2 (can be stacked up to 3 times). Every 15s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). When this ship fires her torpedoes: $4 chance to fire another wave of torpedoes; if this effect does not activate, then the next time the special barrage listed in this skill activates, that barrage will be improved (each barrage can be improved up to 3 times).

151820.name: Fiesta del mar y cielo
151820.desc: When a ship in your Main Fleet fires their Main Guns or launches an airstrike: for 8s, increases this ship's FP by $1 and increases your Vanguard's RLD by $2 (these buffs do not stack; if the condition is met again during its active duration, its duration will only be refreshed); additionally, when this effect activates, there is a $3 chance to fire a $4 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level; 10s cooldown between activations).

151830.name: Surprising Stamp Rally

151840.name: Risk Elimination
151840.desc: 3s after the battle starts, and every 20s after that: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Every time this ship sinks an enemy: increases this ship's FP and TRP by $2 (can be stacked up to 5 times).

151850.name: Air Raid Assistance - Clarence K. Bronson
151850.desc: Increases this ship's ASW by $1. When sortied with another Eagle Union ship: increases this ship's EVA and AA by $1 and applies the effects of the skill Air Raid Assistance (while this ship is afloat, increases the airstrike DMG of your CVs and CVLs by $1; only the strongest Air Raid Assistance skill applies). Every 15s: performs a sonar scan, revealing enemy SSs for 8s.

151860.name: Sea-Top Sprint
151860.desc: Every 5s after the battle starts: $1 chance for this ship to enter Sprint Mode, increasing her SPD by $2 and decreasing her DMG taken by $3 for 2s. When Sprint Mode ends: fires a $4 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

151870.name: Overnutrition
151870.desc: Increases this ship's AVI, RLD, and ACC by $1. When this ship launches an airstrike: performs an additional $2 attack using TBF Avengers (DMG is based on the skill's level).

151880.name: Fresh Milk of Vitality
151880.desc: When this ship launches an airstrike: restores HP equal to $1 of this ship's max HP for 1 ship in your Vanguard and 1 ship in your Main Fleet (choosing the ships with the lowest percentage HP remaining respectively). When this effect activates: increases the DMG dealt of the healing targets by $2 for 5s.

151890.name: The Blue Ghost

151900.name: A Song to Still the Clouds
151900.desc:
Increases this ship's AVI and ACC by $1. If there are 3 or more Eagle Union ships in your fleet: increases this ship's DMG dealt against enemies who have their AA stat debuffed by your ships by $2.
When this ship launches an airstrike: additionally launches a $3 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level) and, for $4s, decreases the SPD of all enemies on the field by 40.0%; if there is another Eagle Union ship in your Main Fleet, and the enemy affected by this effect has their AA stat debuffed by your ships, that enemy's SPD is set to 0 for the duration of the SPD debuff.

151910.name: A Recitatif to the Songbirds

151920.name: The Legendary Mess
151920.desc: When the battle starts: decreases this ship's LCK by 1 and increases the LCK of all other ships in your Surface Fleet by 1. When this ship fires her torpedoes: fires 1 torpedo at your Flagship and grants your Flagship the Emergency Maneuvers buff for 10s (increases your Flagship's EVA by $1 and Evasion Rate by $2, and increases the DMG dealt of your Flagship and your Eagle Union ships by $3). When the Emergency Maneuvers buff ends, if your Flagship is still afloat, William D. Porter recovers $4 of her max HP.

151930.name: Happy D
151930.desc: Every 5s after the battle starts: fires a $1 torpedo barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Every 2 times this ship fires her Main Guns: performs a $1 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by this attack have their ACC decreased by $2 and DMG taken increased by $3 for 4s (this debuff also spreads to other enemies that are within 20 units of the affected enemies). 5s after a fleet this ship is NOT in starts a battle, if this ship is afloat: performs a $1 supporting attack (DMG is based on the skill's level).

151940.name: Inexperienced Patroller
151940.desc: Increases this ship's FP, TRP, and AA by $1. When the battle starts, if there is another ship in your Vanguard: increases this ship's Anti-Air Gun efficiency by $2. Once per battle, when 7 enemy aircraft have been shot down within your AA Gun Range: decreases this ship's DMG taken by 15.0% and increases the AA of your Vanguard by $3 until the battle ends. 15s after the battle starts: drops a depth charge, and all your other ships enter the Attention Underwater state (increases ASW by $4) for 50s.

151980.name: Stoic Nepenthe
151980.desc: Increases this ship's FP, AA, and EVA by $1 and SPD by 8. Every 15s: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); if this barrage fails to activate, this ship's DMG taken is decreased by $4 for 10s.

151990.name: Melted Without a Trace
151990.desc: Every 12s: inflicts Poison (takes 100 DMG every second) for 6s on the enemy with the lowest HP at the time of activation; increases this ship's DMG dealt against enemies with Poison by $1.

152080.name: Jadecarver of the Sea
152080.desc:
At the start of the battle, and when this ship sinks an enemy: all your ships gain 1 stack of Coarse Jade; when any other ship in your fleet sinks an enemy, that ship gains 1 stack of Coarse Jade.
Each ship can gain up to 10 stacks of Coarse Jade, and for each stack, that ship's DMG dealt increases by 1.0%. When a ship reaches 10 stacks of Coarse Jade, that ship gains the Fine Jade status; Fine Jade increases the recipient's Crit Rate by $1 and Crit DMG by $2; if the recipient is a Dragon Empery ship, it further increases their Crit Rate by $3 and Crit DMG by $1.
When the battle starts, if there are 3 or more Dragon Empery ships in your fleet, this ship gains 10 stacks of Coarse Jade and receives the Fine Jade status.

152090.name: Brilliance Through Refinement
152090.desc: Increases this ship's FP and EVA by $1. Every 15s: fires a $2 special barrage and fires it again equal to the number of allies with the Fine Jade status (up to 6 refires; DMG is based on the skill's level). Every time this skill's special barrage activates: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $3 until the battle ends (up to 5 times).

152120.name: Dazzling Fan Dance
152120.desc: Increases this ship's SPD by $1 and Crit Rate by $2. For each Dragon Empery ship in your fleet: increases this ship's ACC by $2 (up to 3 stacks). Every 20s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and increases this ship's Evasion Rate by $4 for 10s; enemies hit by this barrage have their SPD decreased by 20.0% for 10s (does not stack).

152130.name: Serpentine Brushstrokes
152130.desc: Increases this ship's SPD by $1 and Crit Rate by $2. For each Dragon Empery ship in your fleet: increases this ship's TRP by $2 (up to 3 stacks). Every 20s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and deploys a barrier (lasting 10s) that can negate DMG equal to $4 of this ship's max HP; increases this ship's DMG dealt to enemies hit by this barrage by $5.

152000.name: Magistrate of the Empire
152000.desc: Increases this ship's FP and EVA by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

152010.name: Binding Verdict
152010.desc: During battle, when an enemy gets within a certain range: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and restores $2 of this ship's max HP; this effect has a 5s cooldown between activations and can only activate up to 5 times per battle. If this effect activates 5 times in one battle: decreases this ship's DMG taken by 20.0% until the battle ends.

152020.name: Pain, Pain, Fly Away
152020.desc: Once per battle, when any other ship's HP falls below 20.0% as a result of DMG taken, the following effect activates: Ugolino Vivaldi's HP decreases by 1, and that other ship recovers $1 of her max HP (if said ship is from the Sardegna Empire, she recovers an additional 5.0% of her max HP); 3s after this effect activates, Ugolino Vivaldi recovers 10.0% of her max HP.

152030.name: Towards Glory and Death
152030.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ASW by $1. If there are 3 or more Sardegna Empire ships in your fleet: increases all your Sardegna Empire DDs' ASW, FP, and TRP by $1 and increases this ship's EVA by $3 and decreases her aircraft DMG taken by $3. Every 20s: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

152040.name: Gunfire Fouetté
152040.desc: Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. Every 20s: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

152050.name: Ti Sfido!
152050.desc: Every 20s: challenges enemies to a duel, increasing FP, TRP, or EVA by $1 for 10s, and deploying a shield that can block up to 8 enemy shells. Every time this effect is triggered: 10% chance to fire a $2 special torpedo barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

152060.name: I'll Handle This!

152070.name: I'll Whoop You!

152100.name: Atomic Core
152100.desc: When the battle starts, and every 15s: summons $1 Robot Companions to participate in the battle for 12s; increases this ship's DMG dealt by $2 and decreases her DMG taken by $3 for every Robot Companion on the field.

152110.name: Numbers Must Go Up
152110.desc: Increases this ship's FP, TRP, and EVA by $1. Every 20s: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 20.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores 1.0% of this ship's HP every second for 10s.

152140.name: Frost-Shredding Blade
152140.desc: Increases this ship's FP and EVA by $1. Every 2 times this ship fires her Main Guns: inflicts Frostshred on a random enemy; only 1 instance of Frostshred can exist on an enemy at a time, and if another instance is applied, the existing one will be removed; when the enemy with Frostshred is sunk, Frostshred is applied to the enemy closest to that enemy. Decreases this ship's and your Flagship's shelling DMG taken from the enemy with Frostshred by $2.

152150.name: Unyielding Valor

152160.name: Frozen Fortress
152160.desc: Increases your fleet's AA Gun Range by 5. When the battle starts, and every 8s: performs a $1 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit even once by this attack have their AA and SPD decreased by 5.0% until the battle ends. While this ship is afloat, when a fleet this ship is NOT in begins a battle: provides a $1 supporting attack every 8s (DMG is based on the skill's level; can activate up to 2 times per battle).

152170.name: Retribution by Cannonfire
152170.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to deal double the DMG. Every 10s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

152180.name: Unfeeling Protector
152180.desc: When this ship takes DMG: $1 chance to decrease that instance of DMG taken by $2. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 20.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores $3 of this ship's max HP.

152190.name: Freeflowing Air Raid

152200.name: Cloudhaze Cloak
152200.desc: Increases this ship's AA and AVI by $1, and max Detection Gauge by 15. Reduces the loading time of this ship's first Airstrike by $2.

152210.name: Azure Lightning, Thunderous Roar
152210.desc: Increases this ship's Torpedo Crit Rate by $1. When this ship fires her Torpedoes: $2 chance to launch another wave of Torpedoes.

152220.name: Cloudsplitting Thunderclap
152220.desc: Increases this ship's TRP and EVA by $1. 15s after the start of battle, and every 20s afterwards: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by this barrage have their SPD reduced by 10.0% for 8s (this effect cannot be stacked).

152230.name: Dragon's Skyward Prayer

152240.name: O Lurking Thunder, Pierce the Skies
152240.desc: Every 20s: launches a $1 special torpedo barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by this barrage take 12.0% more Torpedo DMG from allied Vanguard DDs and CLs for 5s.

152250.name: Viowet Lightning?
152250.desc: Increases this ship's RLD by $1. During battle, when this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); When this ship is sortied as flagship: improves this barrage.

152260.name: Port's Little Guardian
152260.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt to enemies with Heavy Armor by $1, and increases this ship's Main Gun Crit Rate by $1. Once per battle, when the Vanguard Fleet has taken a total of 20 instances of DMG: reduces the Vanguard Fleet's DMG taken by $2 until the end of battle.

152270.name: Little Ihn!
152270.desc: Every 20s after the start of battle: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level), and increases this ship's FP and ACC by $2 for 15s. Whenever this ship takes DMG: activates this barrage (20s cooldown between activations).

152280.name: A Small Token of Appreciation
152280.desc:
At the start of battle, as long as this ship is not in the frontmost position of the Vanguard, the following effects will be applied to the frontmost ship of the Vanguard:
1) Increases this ship's ACC and EVA by $1 until the end of battle.
2) Once per battle, if this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores 10.0% of this ship's Max HP.

152290.name: Jump Scare!
152290.desc: As long as there are enemies within 40 units of this ship: increases this ship's FP and TRP by $2, and reduces her DMG taken by $1; additionally, shells from this ship's special secondary guns ignore enemy shields.

152300.name: Time For A Spooky Story!
152300.desc: Every 6 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). When this ship is equipped with a Main Gun that has a caliber of 280mm or greater: the number of Main Gun attacks required to trigger this barrage is reduced to 3, and the barrage will be improved. Once per battle, if this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken: reduces this ship's DMG taken by $2 until the end of battle.

152310.name: Waverider's Pursuit
152310.desc: During battle, each time this ship launches her torpedoes: $1 chance to launch a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit by this barrage take $3 increased Torpedo DMG for 10s.

152320.name: Passionate Protector
152320.desc: At the start of battle, increases this ship's TRP and RLD by $1, and AP DMG by $2. Once each battle, whenever this ship takes DMG totalling up to 20.0% of her Max HP: deploys a shield that can block up to 15 enemy projectiles, lasting up to 20s.

152330.name: Let Judgment Be Decreed by Iron Fist
152330.desc:
When this ship's Main Gun finishes reloading: $1 chance to target an enemy, increasing their DMG taken by $2 for 6s (prioritizes humanoid enemies) and fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level);
When an enemy enters a certain range from this ship: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level; 15s cooldown between activations). When this effect is activated for the first time each battle: restores 6.0% of this ship's Max HP.

152340.name: Let the Ode of Rebellion Forever Resound
152340.desc: At the start of battle, increases this ship's FP, ACC, and RLD by $1. Shortens the reload time of this ship's Main Guns by 50.0% but reduces Main Gun DMG by $2. During battle, increases this ship's Crit Rate by $3 and Crit DMG by $4 against enemies that have been on the field for longer than 2s.

152350.name: May the Pact of Blood Never Burn Away
152350.desc: At the start of battle, reduces this ship's DMG taken by $1. As long as this ship is afloat: reduces the Burn DMG taken by Iron Blood ships in your Main Fleet by $2. When a fleet this ship is NOT in starts its first 3 battles of a sortie: as long as this ship is still afloat, fires a $3 supporting barrage 30s after the start of battle and restores 5.0% of the flagship's Max HP (DMG is based on the skill's level).

152360.name: Twin-Thorned Shield
152360.desc: At the start of battle and every 15s after that: deploys 2 types of $1 shields for up to 10s; the violet shield can block up to 2 torpedoes, while the crimson shield can inflict up to 6 instances of collision DMG (DMG is based on the skill's level). Whenever this ship hits an enemy with her torpedoes: restores 1.0% Max HP to all Admiral Hipper-class ships.

152370.name: Deep-Sea Resonator
152370.desc:
When deployed into a sortie, increases this boat's ASR and AMO by 1; at the start of battle, increases this boat's TRP and RLD by $1.
Whenever this boat's torpedoes hit an enemy: $2 chance to inflict a special Flooding debuff (takes DMG every 3s based on U-2501's TRP, lasting for 15s); additionally, increases the DMG this boat deals to Flooding enemies by $1.
Whenever any other ally in the Submarine Fleet hits an enemy with torpedoes: $2 chance to increases this boat's ACC by 1.0% (stacks up to 10 times, lasting until the boat leaves the battle); upon reaching 10 stacks, restores $1 of this boat's Max HP.

152380.name: Listener of the Tides
152380.desc:
At the start of battle: if all 3 allied submarines are present, increases this boat's Torpedo Crit Rate by $3. During battle, increases this boat's OXY by $1. 1s after this boat's OXY reaches 0 and she resurfaces, this boat retreats from battle. 5s after the start of battle: launches a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).
15s after starting battle with a fleet that this boat is NOT in: as long as this boat has not been sunk, launches a $2 supporting barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level), revealing all enemy submarines in the area for 8s and reducing the ACC and EVA of all enemies on the field by $3 for 8s.

152390.name: 潮音的聆听者-跨队效果

152410.name: 不焚的血契之稿-跨队效果

152420.name: Woah! It's Marteau!
152420.desc: When this ship launches an airstrike: throws a $1 Marteau that can hit underwater enemies, pierces shields, and always critically strikes (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by Marteau are inflicted with Armor Break, a special Burn debuff, a special Flooding debuff, and have their SPD and AA reduced by 8.0%, lasting for 6s (DMG of the special Burn and Flooding debuffs are based on AVI and the skill's level).

152430.name: Woohoo! Ready to Fire!
152430.desc: At the start of battle: increases this ship's AVI and AA by $1, and increases the flight speed of this ship's aircraft by 5. Once per battle, when this ship's aircraft shoots down an enemy aircraft: increases this ship's ACC by $2 until the end of battle.

152440.name: Journey to Wonderland
152440.desc: 10s after the battle starts, and every 20s after that: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and increases this ship's EVA and AA by $2, lasting for 10s. During a sortie, for each enemy fleet sunk by the fleet this ship is in: increases this ship's DMG dealt by $3 (can be stacked up to 3 times).

152450.name: Treasures of Hidden Realms
152450.desc:
At the start of battle and every 20s after that, randomly activates one of the following 3 effects:
1) Increases this ship's FP, RLD, and ACC by $1.
2) Increases this ship's Torpedo Crit Rate by $1 and Torpedo Crit DMG by $2.
3) Restores $1 of this ship's Max HP.
Each effect can only be activated once per battle. When all 3 effects have been activated, this skill will no longer be triggered.

152460.name: Illusionist of Fact and Fiction
152460.desc: At the start of battle: increases this ship's AA and EVA by $1. If this ship has a large-caliber Main Gun equipped: increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by 10.0%. Once per battle, if this ship's total DMG taken exceeds 20.0% of her Max HP: increases this ship's SPD by 4 and restores $2 of her Max HP.

152470.name: Seeing Isn't Believing
152470.desc: Every 20s: deploys a zone around this ship that lasts for 8s. While this zone persists: increases this ship's Dodge Rate by $1; additionally, reduces the DMG taken of allied Vanguard ships inside the zone by $1, and reduces the ACC and SPD of enemies inside the zone by $2 and 10.0% respectively.

152480.name: Bladework: Master of Anatomy
152480.desc: At the start of battle: increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. Every 15s: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by this barrage take $3 more DMG from L'Intrépide.

152490.name: Meat Lover
152490.desc: 30s after the battle starts: L'Intrépide gains the Chow Down status, reducing her SPD by 10.0% and DMG taken by $1 for 8s. When the Chow Down status expires: increases this ship's AA and EVA by $2 until the end of battle, and generates a barrier that can absorb up to $3 of this ship's Max HP.

18010.name: MKV-Class AP Shells+
18010.desc: Increases this ship's DMG with AP by $1.

18040.name: Against the Current+
18040.desc: When this ship's HP falls below 20.0%: restores 15.0% of its max HP over 10s. This effect can only activate once per battle. Additionally, for every 1.0% of max HP lost since the start of the battle: increases this ship's RLD by $1.

18050.name: Body and Soul+
18050.desc: Increases this ship's Torpedo Crit Rate by $1 and Torpedo Crit DMG by 65.0%. Additionally, when this ship fires its Torpedoes: increases this ship's EVA by $2 for 6s.

18070.name: A Legend's Inheritance+
18070.desc: When this ship fires its Main Guns: $1 chance to fire an improved special barrage. Barrage damage is based on the skill's level.

18100.desc_get: After the battle begins and every 30s after that: deploys 4 rotating shields that can each block up to 8 hits. Shields last for <color=#92fc63FF>5</color>s (<color=#92fc63FF>15</color>s when fully upgraded.)
18100.name: Well-Rounded Armor+
18100.desc: After the battle begins and every 30s after that: deploys 4 rotating shields that can each block up to 8 hits. Shields last for $1s.

18120.desc_get: Increases this ship's Speed by <color=#92fc63FF>3</color> (<color=#92fc63FF>8</color> when fully upgraded.) At the start of the battle: increases this ship's EVA by <color=#92fc63FF>15.0%</color> (<color=#92fc63FF>35.0%</color> when fully upgraded) for 50s.
18120.name: Engine Boost+
18120.desc: Increases this ship's Speed by $1. At the start of the battle: increases this ship's EVA by $2 for 50s.

18130.name: No-Fly Zone!+
18130.desc: When an enemy aircraft is shot down within your fleet's Anti-Air Gun range: increases this ship's FP and AA by $1 for 8s; if your Airspace Control of the map is at Parity or higher: this buff's duration extends until the end of the battle, but does not stack. Additionally, when your fleet has shot down 15 or more aircraft in one battle: increases this ship's FP and RLD by $2 until the end of the battle.

18150.name: Iron Sight Caliber+
18150.desc: Decreases this ship's Main Gun Spread Range by 3 and increases its DMG dealt to CAs, CBs, BCs, BBs, and BBVs by $1, and also increases its DMG dealt to CVs and CVLs by $2.

18180.name: Kitakaze Style - Lotus Torpedoes+
18180.desc: 10s after the start of the battle: fires a special torpedo barrage ($1) and decreases this ship's DMG taken by $2 for 50s. After every 8 hits with this ship's Torpedoes (barrage torpedoes do not count): fires this same barrage.

18200.name: Mizuho's Intuition+
18200.desc: Every 20s: $1 chance to increase this ship's EVA by $2, Accuracy by $3, and decrease this ship's torpedo DMG taken by $4 for 12s.

18210.name: Special Gunnery Training+
18210.desc: Fires a special barrage that Burns enemies once every 8 times this ship fires her Main Guns. While equipping a Large-Caliber Main Gun: increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1, lowers the number of shots needed to fire the barrage to 4, and improves the barrage.

18220.name: Symphony of Destruction+
18220.desc: When this ship takes DMG or when an enemy comes within close range of her: fires a $1 special barrage - Eins (DMG is based on the skill's level; 15s cooldown between activations). When this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special barrage - Zwei (DMG is based on the skill's level). Both these barrages always fire from your Flagship position.

18240.name: Rhapsody of Darkness+
18240.desc: Increases this ship's FP by $1 and decreases her DMG taken by $2. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken: increases this ship's Secondary Gun Shell Velocity by 15.0% and increases her Secondary Gun efficiency by $3.

18250.name: Emotion Inhibition Module+
18250.desc: At the start of battle, if this ship's HP is greater than 50.0%: increases this ship's AA by $2 and improves this ship's Precision Salvo Protocol barrage. Additionally, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0%: for 8s, increases this ship's EVA by $1 and restores a total of 8.0% of its max HP (this effect can only be triggered twice per battle).

18270.name: Bounce Right Back+
18270.desc: Decreases the loading time of this ship's first 2 waves of torpedoes by $1. When this ship takes DMG: 15.0% chance to increase this ship's FP, EVA, and AA by $2 until the end of the battle. Can be stacked up to 3 times. While this ship's HP is at 80.0% or higher: increases this ship's DMG dealt with torpedoes by $3.

18290.name: The Fearless Privateer+
18290.desc: Increases this ship's built-in Secondary Gun's Crit Rate by $2 and improves its ammo type. When this ship uses a Main Gun that fires Normal or HE ammo: this ship's Main Gun ammo type changes to $1 special HE+ that has a chance to inflict a special Burn to enemies hit (DMG is based on the skill's level). Decreases the shot requirement of this ship's All Out Assault skill to 6.

18300.name: Flintlock Burst+
18300.desc: Every $1s: fires a special barrage that penetrates enemy shields and heals this ship for 20.0% of the DMG dealt (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level.) Increases this ship's FP and EVA by $2 and RLD by $3.

18320.name: Ausgewogen+
18320.desc: At the start of the battle: increases this ship's Speed by 5 and EVA by $1 and decreases her DMG taken by $2 for 60s; increases this ship's Crit DMG by $3 and, every 15s: $4 chance to fire a special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

18340.name: Herteitr's Rolling Thunder+
18340.desc: Every 18s: $1 chance to fire a special barrage that ignores enemy shields (improved pattern; DMG is based on the skill's level.) Changes the Spread Angle of this ship's torpedoes.

18350.name: Augmenting Mechanism: Setzer Principle+
18350.desc: Decreases the loading time of this ship's Main Guns by $1 and fires an additional $2 barrage along with this ship's primary Salvoes (improved pattern; barrage is unaffected by this ship's position). Every 20s: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

18380.name: Sky-Rending Retribution+
18380.desc: When this ship launches an airstrike: $1 chance to launch an additional $2 special airstrike+ (DMG increased; DMG is based on the skill's level).

18400.name: The Great One's Shadow+
18400.desc: Increases this ship's AVI, AA, and ACC by $1. When the battle starts, if this ship has Sakura Empire aircraft equipped, or if there is another Sakura Empire ship in your fleet: increases all of this ship's weapon efficiencies by $2.

18440.name: Riddle Me This+
18440.desc: Increases this ship's EVA by $1; when this ship fires her Torpedoes: $2 chance to fire a $3 improved special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this barrage fails to activate: instead decreases the loading time of this ship's next wave of Torpedoes by 3s.

18460.name: Hex-Principle of Insight+
18460.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: $1 chance to inflict 234 DMG to all enemies and gradually reduce their SPD to 0 over 2.5s, then returning to normal instantly after 1.5s.

18500.name: Il Milione+
18500.desc: If there is at least 1 other ship in your Main Fleet: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $1 and increases her Main Gun Efficiency by $2 and AA Gun efficiency by 50.0%. When the battle starts, deploys 2 shields that can block 3 enemy torpedoes around the frontmost ship of your Vanguard. Improves the barrage fired by this ship's "Legendary Voyage" skill; if this ship is your Flagship, also increases the barrage's activation chance by 10.0%; if this ship is NOT your Flagship, instead increases the amount of max HP healed by "Legendary Voyage" to 8.0%.

18550.name: Lindwurm - Devouring Fang+
18550.desc: During battle, this ship gains a $1 special Secondary Gun; every 5 times she fires this Secondary Gun: launches a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and restores 2.0% HP to the ship with the lowest HP percentage in the fleet; the 4th time she fires this Secondary Gun: increases this ship's FP and TRP by $3.

18590.name: Blazing Battledance+
18590.desc: Every 20s: $1 chance to launch an enhanced special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). When this ship takes DMG: 20.0% chance to increase this ship's FP and AA by $2 and TRP by $3 (can be stacked up to 3 times).

18610.name: Contingency Experiment - Suppressive Fire+
18610.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt against Medium and Heavy Armor enemies by $1. When this ship's airstrike finishes loading: fires a special barrage that decreases the AA of enemies hit by 10.0% and decreases their SPD by 50.0% for 3s (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level; barrage debuffs cannot be stacked). Further improves the effect of the barrage triggered by the skill "Aviation Experiment - Coordinated Bombardment."

18620.name: Tormentor of the Weak+
18620.desc:
Increases this ship's Crit Rate by $4 and Crit DMG by $2.
Every 20s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); increases this ship's DMG dealt by $4 to enemies hit by this barrage; if this ship has a CL Main Gun equipped: increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1, reduces the activation interval of this special barrage to 10s, and fires this barrage once 3s after the battle starts.

18730.name: Apotheosis: Flourishing Assault+
18730.desc: Every 20s: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). When this ship fires her 2nd Main Gun volley: randomly marks 1 enemy target. This ship deals $2 increased DMG to the marked enemy; when that enemy is sunk, Flandre's next Main Gun volley will activate this effect again.

18760.name: Divine Presence+

18780.name: Blade of Iris Aspirations+
18780.desc: Increases this ship's FP and RLD by $1 and DMG dealt by 15.0%. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: this ship evades all attacks for 5s; when this effect activates: decreases the ACC of all enemies on the battlefield by $2 until the battle ends.

18790.name: Nocturnal Judgment+
18790.desc: Improves this ship's airstrikes. When the battle starts, if this ship has Eagle Union gear equipped: increases this ship's FP and AVI by $1. Every 15s: applies a mark to all enemies on the battlefield, decreasing their EVA by $2 for 6s while launching a $3 seaplane attack (DMG is based on the skill's level). When an enemy marked by this skill is hit by Halford's torpedoes or her seaplane attack: increases that enemy's DMG taken by 8.0% for 8s.

18860.name: Causality Anchor+
18860.desc: Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: fires an improved $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) that inflicts a special Burn ailment for 15s to enemies hit. When the skill Blessings and Purity activates: the recon plane launched by the skill can target up to an additional 3 enemies.

19000.name: Siren Killer Ⅰ
19000.desc: Increases this ship's DMG to Sirens by 5.0%.

19001.name: Siren Killer Ⅱ
19001.desc: Increases this ship's DMG to Sirens by 10.0%.

19002.name: Siren Killer Ⅲ
19002.desc: Increases this ship's DMG to Sirens by 15.0%.

19010.name: MKV-Class AP Shells
19010.desc: Increases this ship's DMG with AP by $1.

19020.name: Goddess of the Sea
19020.desc: Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 20.0%: restores $1 of its max HP and increases this ship's RLD by 30.0% for the rest of the battle.

19030.name: Monarch's Coercion
19030.desc: When this ship fires a Salvo: $1 chance to fire a special barrage. Decreases the Speed of enemies hit by the barrage by $2 for 6s. Barrage DMG is based on the skill's level.

19040.name: Against the Current
19040.desc: Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 20.0%: restores 12.0% of its max HP over 8s. Additionally, for every 1.0% of max HP lost since the start of the battle: increases this ship's RLD by $1.

19050.name: Body and Soul
19050.desc: Increases this ship's Torpedo Crit Rate by $1 and Torpedo Crit DMG by 65.0%.

19060.name: Flash of Lightning
19060.desc: When this ship fires its Torpedoes: $1 chance to launch a special torpedo barrage. Barrage DMG is based on the skill's level.

19070.name: A Legend's Inheritance
19070.desc: When this ship fires a Salvo: $1 chance to fire a special barrage. Barrage DMG is based on the skill's level.

19080.name: Specialized Armor
19080.desc: Decreases the AP DMG this ship takes by $1 but slightly increases this ship's chance of catching fire (depends on the enemy's weapon caliber; maximum of 6.0%) and increases its Burn Duration by 3s.

19090.name: Expert Loader
19090.desc: Changes the ammo type of this ship's Main Guns to HE. Every time this ship fires its Main Guns: increases this ship's RLD by $1 (can be stacked up to 12 times.) The ammo type of this ship's Main Guns will alternate between HE and AP every 2 shots.

19100.desc_get: Every 30s: deploys 4 rotating shields that can each block up to 8 hits. Shields last for 5s (15s when fully upgraded.)
19100.name: Well-Rounded Armor
19100.desc: Every 30s: deploys 4 rotating shields that can each block up to 8 hits. Shields last for $1s.

19110.name: Augmented HE Ammo
19110.desc: Increases this ship's DMG with HE by $1 but decreases its chance to ignite enemies by 3.0%.

19120.desc_get: Increases this ship's Speed by 3 (8 when fully upgraded.) At the start of the battle: increases this ship's EVA by 15.0% (35.0% when fully upgraded) for 40s.
19120.name: Engine Boost
19120.desc: Increases this ship's Speed by $1. At the start of the battle: increases this ship's EVA by $2 for 40s.

19130.name: No-Fly Zone!
19130.desc: When an enemy aircraft is shot down within your fleet's Anti-Air Gun range: increases this ship's FP and AA by $1 for 8s. When your fleet has shot down 15 or more aircraft in one battle: increases this ship's FP by $1 and RLD by $2 until the end of the battle.

19140.name: Dual Nock
19140.desc: While equipping a Main Gun in this ship's Secondary Weapon slot: increases this ship's Anti-Air Gun efficiency by $1. If instead equipping an Anti-Air Gun in this slot: increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $2. While placed in the rearmost position of your Vanguard: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $3.

19150.name: Iron Sight Caliber
19150.desc: Decreases this ship's Main Gun Spread Range by 3 and increases its DMG dealt to CAs, CBs, BCs, BBs, and BBVs by $1.

19160.name: Heavy Barrel Blaster
19160.desc: When this ship fires a Salvo: $1 chance to fire a special barrage.

19170.name: Kitakaze Style - Horizon Splitter
19170.desc: This ship's Main Guns ignore the enemy's Armor Type and its Main Gun DMG increases based on the skill's level ($1.) While equipping a Sakura Empire Main Gun: increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $2.

19180.name: Kitakaze Style - Lotus Torpedoes
19180.desc: 10s after the start of battle, if this ship is in the frontmost position of your Vanguard: fires a special torpedo barrage ($1.) After every 10 hits with this ship's Torpedoes (barrage torpedoes do not count): fires this same barrage.

19190.name: Blazing Peaks
19190.desc: When this ship equips a Main Gun with a caliber of 280mm or higher: increases its Main Gun DMG based on the distance its shells travel to reach the enemy, up to a maximum of $1. Increases this ship's Burn DMG dealt by $2.

19200.name: Mizuho's Intuition
19200.desc: Every 20s: $1 chance to increase this ship's EVA by $2 and Accuracy by $3 for 12s.

19210.name: Special Gunnery Training
19210.desc: Fires a special barrage once every 8 times this ship fires her Main Guns. While equipping the Prototype Triple 310mm Main Gun (Type 0): increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1, lowers the number of shots needed to fire the barrage to 4, and improves the barrage.

19220.name: Symphony of Destruction
19220.desc: When this ship takes DMG or when an enemy comes within close range of this ship: fires a $1 special barrage that ignores the enemy's Armor Type (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level.) Has a 15s cooldown between activations.

19230.name: Sonata of Chaos
19230.desc: When this ship fires an odd-numbered Salvo: increases its RLD by $1 and DMG dealt by $2 until its next reloaded Salvo. When this ship fires an even-numbered Salvo: increases its Crit Rate by $2 and Crit DMG by $1 until its next reloaded Salvo.

19240.name: Rhapsody of Darkness
19240.desc: Applies a buff to this ship based on its HP remaining. When between 100% and 70%: increases FP by $1; when between 70% and 30%: increases FP by $2 and decreases DMG taken by $2; when less than 30%: decreases DMG taken by $3.

19250.name: Emotion Inhibition Module
19250.desc: Up to twice per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0%: for 8s, increases this ship's EVA by $1 and restores a total of 8.0% of its max HP.

19260.name: Precision Salvo Protocol
19260.desc: Each Main Gun reload gives this ship 2 Salvoes that can be fired independently. This ship's DMG bonus with manually aimed Salvoes becomes $2. Every 20s: $1 chance to fire a special barrage (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level.)

19270.name: Bounce Right Back
19270.desc: Decreases the loading time of this ship's first wave of torpedoes by $1. When this ship takes DMG: 15.0% chance to increase this ship's FP, EVA, and AA by $2 until the end of the battle. Can be stacked up to 3 times.

19280.name: Grin and Fire!
19280.desc: Decreases this ship's DMG taken by $1. Every 12s after the start of the battle: $2 chance to fire a special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level.)

19290.name: The Fearless Privateer
19290.desc: Increases this ship's built-in Secondary Gun Crit Rate by $2 and improves its ammo. When this ship uses a Main Gun that fires Normal or HE ammo: this ship's Main Gun ammo type changes to $1 special HE with a chance to cause a special Burn to enemies (special HE DMG increase is based on the skill's level.)

19300.name: Flintlock Burst
19300.desc: Every $1s: fires a special barrage that ignores enemy shields and heals this ship for 15.0% of the DMG dealt (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level.) When this ship sinks an enemy: increases this ship's FP and EVA by $2 and RLD by $3 until the end of the battle. Can be stacked up to 3 times; if this ship is in the frontmost position of your Vanguard at the start of the battle: immediately gives all 3 stacks of this buff.

19310.name: Retaliatory Shield
19310.desc: Every 15s: deploys a shield in front of this ship that lasts 8s and can block up to 6 enemy shells; if this shield is destroyed within the allotted time: fires a barrage and increases this ship's FP and Accuracy by $1 until the end of the battle. This buff can be stacked twice.

19320.name: Ausgewogen
19320.desc: At the start of the battle, if this ship is in the frontmost position of your Vanguard: increases this ship's Speed by 5 and EVA by $1 until the end of the battle, and decreases its DMG taken by $2 for 30s; if NOT in the frontmost position: increases this ship's Crit DMG by $3 and, every 15s: has a $4 chance to fire a special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level.)

19330.name: Mímir's Keen Eyes
19330.desc: Changes this ship's position and decreases its DMG taken by $1. Every 15s: commences a sonar scan, revealing the location of all enemy SSs for $2s, reducing their accuracy by $4, and decreasing your Vanguard's DMG taken from torpedoes by $3 for $2s.

19340.name: Herteitr's Rolling Thunder
19340.desc: Every 18s: $1 chance to fire a special barrage with thunderbolts that ignore enemy shields (DMG is based on the skill's level.) Changes the Spread Angle of this ship's torpedoes.

19350.name: Augmenting Mechanism: Setzer Principle
19350.desc: Decreases the loading time of this ship's Main Guns by $1 and fires an additional $2 barrage along with its primary Salvoes. Every 20s: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level.)

19360.name: Substitute Mechanism: Holy Thurible
19360.desc: When this ship uses a Main Gun that fires HE ammo: increases its FP by $4, AA by $1, and increases its HE DMG modifier against enemies with Heavy armor by $1; when using one that fires AP: increases this ship's FP by $4, RLD by $1, and increases its Crit Rate by $2. While this ship is above 75.0% HP: absorbs 50.0% of the DMG your Flagship takes (does nothing if this ship is the Flagship); when this ship's HP falls below 75.0%: increases this ship's EVA and Accuracy by $3.

19380.name: Sky-Rending Retribution
19380.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: $1 chance to launch an additional special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level).

19390.name: Flame-Anointed Conquest
19390.desc: When this ship is equipped with a Fighter: fires a $1 special barrage every 12s; when this ship has no Fighters equipped: instead follows up her every Airstrike with a $2 slashing attack (barrage and slash attack DMG are based on the skill's level).

19400.name: The Great One's Shadow
19400.desc: When this ship is equipped with Sakura Empire aircraft: increases this ship's AVI and Accuracy by $1; when none are equipped: instead increases this ship's AA and Accuracy by $1.

19410.name: Engulfer of the Golden Vortex
19410.desc: When this ship's Torpedoes hit an enemy: decreases the target's Speed by $1 for 5s. As long as this ship is not Out of Ammo, increases this ship's EVA by $2.

19420.name: Abyssal Banquet
19420.desc: When this ship is equipped with a Main Gun that fires Normal or AP ammo: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $1 and increases Crit Rate by $2; when equipping one that fires HE ammo: increases this ship's DMG dealt by $3, but makes her unable to Burn enemies. If the equipped Main Gun is high-caliber: also increases this ship's Main Gun Efficiency by $4.

19430.name: Jöttun's Jaws
19430.desc: If there are no enemies near this ship when she fires her Main Guns: inflicts Armor Break to all enemies hit; once every 8 times her Main Guns are fired: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this ship's Main Gun is high-caliber: decreases the number of shots required to 4.

19440.name: Riddle Me This
19440.desc: Increases this ship's EVA by $1; when this ship fires her Torpedoes: $2 chance to fire a special barrage $3 (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this barrage fails to activate: instead decreases the loading time of this ship's next wave of Torpedoes by 3s.

19450.name: Hide and Seek
19450.desc: When this ship fires her Torpedoes: deploys a smokescreen and a barrier. Smokescreen lasts 5s and increases Evasion Rate by $1 for all your ships in it (does not stack with other smokescreen skills). The barrier lasts 5s and can absorb DMG up to $2 of this ship's max HP. If this barrier is destroyed before it expires: this ship gains 100% Evasion Rate for 2s.

19460.name: Hex-Principle of Insight
19460.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: $1 chance to inflict 234 DMG to all enemies and gradually reduce their SPD to 0 over 2.5s, then returning to normal instantly after 1s.

19470.name: Hex-Principle of Shattering
19470.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: launches an additional $1 airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level). Inflicts Armor Break to all Light and Medium armor enemies hit by this airstrike.

19480.name: Hex-Principle of Dominance
19480.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt to CLs and CAs by $1. When this ship is equipped with Iron Blood aircraft: increases this ship's AVI and RLD by $2 and Fighter efficiency by $3.

19490.name: Legendary Voyage
19490.desc: When this ship has the Out of Ammo debuff: decreases the DMG penalty's effect by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a frontal barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this barrage fails to activate: heals this ship for 5.0% of her max HP.

19500.name: Il Milione
19500.desc: If there is at least 1 other Sardegnian ship in your fleet: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $1. At the start of the battle, if the frontmost ship in your Vanguard is a Sardegnian ship: increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $2 and her AA Gun efficiency by 50.0%; if said ship is not Sardegnian, instead spawns 2 shields around that ship that can block 3 enemy torpedoes.

19510.name: Untold Tales
19510.desc: During a sortie, whenever the fleet this ship is in sinks an enemy fleet: increases this ship's AA and EVA by $1 (can be stacked up to 3 times). While this ship is afloat: launches a $2 supporting barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) 20s after a fleet this ship is NOT in starts its 1st and 2nd battles that sortie; for said fleet's 3rd and 4th battles: decreases DMG taken by $3 for your Sardegnian ships.

19530.name: Rejoice in Radiance
19530.desc: When the battle starts, increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. If sortied with another Royal Navy ship, or if this ship has Royal Navy gear equipped: increases this ship's EVA by $2.

19540.name: Pathfinder's Shroud
19540.desc: Every 10s: fires a special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and becomes Shrouded for 5s (while Shrouded, this ship takes $2 less DMG; upon becoming Shrouded for the 3rd time, she also restores $3 of her max HP). Enemies hit by this barrage become Exposed for 10s; Exposed enemies take $1 increased DMG from your Flagship if she is a BB, BC, or BBV.

19550.name: Lindwurm - Devouring Fang
19550.desc: During battle, this ship gains a $1 special Secondary Gun; every 5 times she fires this Secondary Gun: launches a $2 special torpedo barrage (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level); the 8th time she fires this Secondary Gun: increases this ship's FP and TRP by $3.

19560.name: Lindwurm - Protector's Oculus
19560.desc: When the battle starts, if this ship is your Flagship: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $1; if NOT your Flagship, decreases DMG taken by the ship above your Flagship by $2. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $3 chance to fire a special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

19580.name: Impactful Torpedoes
19580.desc: Decreases this ship's DMG taken from torpedoes by 10.0%; Increases DMG dealt against Heavy Armor enemies with this ship's equipped torpedoes by $1, and increases the torpedo DMG dealt by Dragon Empery DDs by $4. When this ship fires her torpedoes: creates a smokescreen for 3s that increases Evasion Rate by $3 and decreases DMG taken from enemy aircraft by $3 for all your ships inside it (this effect does not stack with "Smokescreen: Light Cruisers"); After 3s, $2 chance to launch an additional wave of torpedoes and trigger this smokescreen effect again.

19590.name: Blazing Battledance
19590.desc: Every 20s: $1 chance to launch a special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). When this ship takes DMG: 20.0% chance to increase this ship's FP and AA by $2 and TRP by $3 (can be stacked up to 3 times).

19600.name: Aviation Experiment - Coordinated Bombardment
19600.desc: When the battle starts, increases this ship's AVI and RLD by $1. When this ship launches an airstrike: launches an additional $2 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level; $3 chance on launch to improve this special airstrike).

19610.name: Contingency Experiment - Suppressive Fire
19610.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt against Medium and Heavy Armor enemies by $1. When this ship's airstrike finishes loading: fires a special barrage that decreases the AA of enemies hit by 10.0% (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level; AA debuff cannot be stacked).

19630.name: Ensemble of Exultation
19630.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. When the battle starts, if there are 3 ships in your Vanguard: increases this ship's EVA by $2 and decreases her DMG taken by $3.

19640.name: Aria of Alacrity
19640.desc: When the battle starts, increases this ship's SPD by 3 and EVA by $1. If this ship has Iris Libre gear equipped: increases this ship's Main Gun Crit DMG and AA by $2.

19650.name: Panacea's Paean
19650.desc: Once every 8 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); if this ship's Main Gun is large-caliber: decreases the number of shots required to 4 and changes the properties of this barrage. The 1st time this barrage fires every battle: restores $2 max HP to the ship with the lowest percentage HP left in your fleet; the 2nd time this barrage fires: restores $3 of this ship's max HP.

19659.name: 布雷斯特展示关卡用
19659.desc: Once every 8 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); if this ship's Main Gun is large-caliber: decreases the number of shots required to 4 and changes the properties of this barrage. The 1st time this barrage fires every battle: restores $2 max HP to the ship with the lowest percentage HP left in your fleet; the 2nd time this barrage fires: restores $3 of this ship's max HP.

19660.name: Multi-Linked Locking System
19660.desc: Increases this ship's AVI and FP by $1. When this ship's aircraft hits an enemy: $2 chance to inflict a special Burn ailment to that target for 10s, increasing that target's shelling DMG taken from your Main Fleet by 8.0%. When this ship's Main Guns hit an enemy: $2 chance to increase the target's airstrike DMG taken from your Main Fleet by 4.0%; if the target is already affected by an AA stat debuff, further increases that target's airstrike DMG taken from your Main Fleet by 8.0%. This effect lasts until the next time this ship fires her Main Guns.

19670.name: Functional Amplification Mechanism
19670.desc: If this ship has an Eagle Union or Northern Parliament Main Gun equipped: increases this ship's FP by $1 and decreases her cannon DMG taken by $2. If this ship has an Eagle Union or Northern Parliament aircraft equipped: increases this ship's AVI by $1 and decreases the loading time of her 1st airstrike by $4. When the battle starts, if there is another Eagle Union ship in your Main Fleet: while this ship is afloat, your CVs and CVLs deal $3 more airstrike DMG (does not stack with the skill "Air Raid Assistance").

19680.name: Combat Adaptation Module
19680.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt to Burning enemies by $1. When this ship launches an airstrike: launches an additional $2 special airstrike. Every 20s: fires a $2 special barrage with properties that change based on whether or not there are Burning enemies on the battlefield (inflicts a special Burn for 10s to enemies hit by the Oceanic Blaze special barrage; DMG is based on the skill's level).

19690.name: Tormentor of the Weak
19690.desc:
Increases this ship's Crit Rate by $1 and Crit DMG by $2 when attacking enemies below 50.0% HP.
Every 20s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); increases this ship's DMG dealt by $4 to enemies hit by this barrage (effect does not stack); if this ship has a CL Main Gun equipped: increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1 and reduces the activation interval of this special barrage to 10s.

19700.name: Drown in the Abyss of Desire
19700.desc: Increases this ship's EVA by $2 and decreases her DMG taken by $2. Decreases the speed of this ship's torpedoes by 1 and increases their DMG dealt by $1. When the battle starts, and every 10: deploys a shield (lasts 5s; can block up to 5 shells); if this shield expires or is destroyed, increases this ship's Evasion Rate by $3 until this shield is deployed again. If this ship has an AP Main Gun equipped: increases this ship's DMG dealt to CLs and CAs by $4.

19710.name: The Most Dangerous Game
19710.desc:
Increases this ship's FP by 5.0% and EVA and ACC by $1. 
One of the following two effects apply based on what type of weapon this ship has equipped in her third weapon slot:
 1): Main Gun: increases this ship's FP by $2 and DMG dealt by 5.0%. Shells fired from this ship's Main Guns ignore enemy shields.
 2): AA Gun: increases this ship's EVA by $3 and decreases her DMG taken by 8.0%. When the battle starts, and every 30s: deploys 2 shields (last 15s; can each block up to 8 shells).

19720.name: Doombringer's Euphoria
19720.desc: 3s after the battle starts, and every 15s after that: fires a $1 special barrage that inflicts the Hunted debuff to enemies hit (DMG is based on the skill's level). Every 5s, if there are enemies with the Hunted debuff on the battlefield: performs a special attack.

19730.name: Apotheosis: Flourishing Assault
19730.desc: Every 20s: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). When this ship fires her 2nd Main Gun volley, if she has at least 60.0% HP remaining: randomly marks 1 enemy target, prioritizing Humanoid enemies. This ship deals $2 increased DMG to the marked enemy. The mark lasts until Flandre falls below 60.0% HP as a result of DMG taken.

19740.name: Apotheosis: Lightplume Vestments
19740.desc: Increases this ship's EVA by $1 and FP by $2. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores 3.0% of this ship's max HP once per second for 5s, then sets this ship's Secondary Gun Eff. Range and Shell Range to 95 and increases her Secondary Gun efficiency by 30.0%.

19750.name: Torrential Wrath
19750.desc:
With every 2nd wave of torpedoes this ship fires: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) that inflicts a special Flooding ailment to enemies hit for 6s; when this barrage activates: extinguishes all Burning ships in your fleet (does not affect special Burn ailments) and, for 3s, reduces the Burn DMG taken by your fleet by $2.
When the barrage from this skill is activated for the second time: improves this barrage until the end of battle, and fires it again after 5s.

19760.name: Divine Presence
19760.desc: When the battle starts: this ship gains a $1 special AA Gun (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this ship has the Prototype 150mm Type 5 High-Angle Gun Mount equipped: increases this ship's 3rd weapon slot efficiency by 30.0%. Every 10s, or when a ship in your fleet fires her AA Gun: increases your Vanguard's AA by $2 (maximum of 3 activations; can be stacked). When this effect activates 3 times: restores 4.0% of your Vanguard's max HP and, until the battle ends, decreases Shimanto's DMG taken by $3.

19770.name: The Dauntless Exemplar
19770.desc: Decreases this ship's torpedo DMG taken by $1. Every 10s, this ship gains the Exemplary Knight status: for 5s, increases this ship's SPD by 20.0%, EVA by $2, and Evasion Rate by $1, and fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

19780.name: Blade of Iris Aspirations
19780.desc: Increases this ship's FP and RLD by $1. The lower this ship's current HP is, the more DMG she deals (up to 15.0% more DMG). Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: for 5s, this ship evades all attacks; when this effect activates, decreases the ACC of all enemies present on the battlefield by $1 until the battle ends.

19790.name: Nocturnal Judgment
19790.desc: When the battle starts, if this ship has Eagle Union gear equipped: increases this ship's AVI by $1. Every 15s: targets a random enemy (humanoid enemies are prioritized) and decreases that enemy's EVA by $2 for 6s and launches a $3 seaplane attack (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this seaplane hits the random enemy targeted by this skill: increases that enemy's cannon DMG taken by 8.0% for 6s.

19800.name: Pedigree of Perfection
19800.desc:
Increases this ship's EVA by $1. If this ship does NOT have a Seaplane equipped: increases this ship's TRP and AA by $3, decreases her DMG taken by $4, and, every 15s, fires a $5 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).
If this ship has a Seaplane equipped, activates the following effects:1) When this ship launches an odd number of airstrikes: deploys a smokescreen (lasts 5s) that increases Evasion Rate by $2 for all your ships in it (does not stack with other smokescreen skills);2) When this ship launches an even number of airstrikes: restores 4.0% of this ship's max HP and extinguishes any Burn this ship is afflicted with.

19810.name: Destructive Connection: Peak Load Crash
19810.desc: Increases this ship's AVI and ACC by $1 and Crit Rate by $2. When this ship launches an airstrike: launches an additional $3 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level); 1.5s after this effect activates, inflicts the Crashed debuff to all enemies on the battlefield, decreasing their SPD by 60.0% for 5s.

19820.name: Vulnerability Exploit: Security Breach
19820.desc:
When this ship launches an airstrike: targets a random enemy (prioritizes humanoid enemies) and decreases that enemy's AA and EVA by 5.0% for 6s and increases their DMG taken by 5.0%.
Enemies with a SPD-decreasing debuff inflicted by another Northern Parliament ship's skill in your fleet gain the Enfeebled debuff; when an enemy with the Enfeebled debuff is inflicted with the Crashed status, their SPD is set to 0 for 2.5s.
Increases this ship's Crit DMG against enemies with the Enfeebled debuff by $1.

19830.name: Authorization Module: Trusted Certificate
19830.desc:
Increases this ship's AA and EVA by $1. Every 25s after the battle starts: for 5s, increases this ship's Detection Gauge recovery speed by 2.
Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 40.0% as a result of DMG taken: sets this ship's Detection Gauge to 0 and any Burn DMG this ship takes for the next 8s is set to 0; this effect does not extinguish an active Burn.

19840.name: Requiem Aeternam
19840.desc: During battle, this ship uses a special $1 Secondary Gun (fires once every second; barrage pattern is based on the skill's level). Increases this ship's FP and EVA by $2. While there is an enemy within 40 units of this ship: this ship's Main Guns, Secondary Guns, and special Secondary Gun all ignore enemy shields.

19850.name: Caelum Imbrialis
19850.desc:
When the battle starts, and every 20s: deploys a smokescreen (lasts 5s) that increases Evasion Rate by $1 for all your ships in it (does not stack with other smokescreen skills). 
After the above effect activates: for 5s, creates an exhaust smokescreen (lasts 1s) every 0.5s that increases Napoli's Evasion Rate by $2 and Secondary Gun efficiency by $3 (this does not affect her special Secondary Gun) while she is inside the smokescreen; other smokescreen skills do not affect Napoli during the active duration.

19860.name: Causality Anchor

19870.name: Blessings and Purity
19870.desc:
When this ship's Main Guns finish loading: launches a recon plane and targets the enemy furthest from this ship, increasing this ship's DMG dealt to that enemy by $1 for 10s.
If the recon plane launched by this skill is shot down: restores $2 of your Vanguard's max HP. Once per battle, when 2 recon planes launched by this skill have been shot down, also restores 5.0% max HP for the ship in your Vanguard with the lowest current HP percentage.

19880.name: 那不勒斯燃油烟雾buff效果占位
19880.desc: 那不勒斯燃油烟雾占位

19890.name: Ultimatum: Flügelsturm
19890.desc:
10s after the battle starts, and every 20s after that: fires a $1 special barrage I (DMG is based on the skill's level) that increases this ship's DMG dealt by $2 against enemies hit by the barrage.
When this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special barrage II (DMG is based on the skill's level) and applies the following effects to a randomly chosen enemy for 8s:
1) Increases this ship's Crit Rate by $3 and Crit DMG dealt by $4 when hitting that enemy;
2) Increases that enemy's DMG taken by $5. If that enemy is affected by a pulling effect: further increases their DMG taken by $5.

19900.name: Origination: Principia Reconstruction
19900.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1, decreases this ship's Main Gun Spread by $2, and increases her DMG modifier against Heavy Armor enemies by $1. When there is another Iron Blood ship in your Main Fleet: increases this ship's RLD by $1.

19910.name: Overlimit: Unbreakable Barrier
19910.desc: Increases this ship's EVA and AA by $1. While this ship's HP is above 50.0%: tanks 50.0% of the DMG received by your Flagship (does not apply if this ship is your Flagship); once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: this ship evades all attacks for 3s.

19920.name: Starfall

19930.name: Nature's Blessing
19930.desc: Increases this ship's ACC and EVA by $1 and decreases her shelling DMG taken by $2. When the 2nd and 3rd Bombing Raids activate: restores HP equal to 3.0% of their max HP to this ship as well as the ship in your fleet with the current lowest HP and increases your fleet's AA by $3 until the battle ends (can be stacked up to 2 times).

19940.name: Spiritual Echoes
19940.desc: Every 4 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this ship has a large-caliber Main Gun equipped: increases this ship's Main Gun and Secondary Gun efficiency by $2 and changes the special barrage's pattern; if this ship does NOT have one equipped, this ship's Main Guns instead ignore enemy shields.

19950.name: Ambrosial Arc's Moonhaze
19950.desc:
When this ship fires her torpedoes: deploys $1 Exhaust Haze and deploys another instance of it every 0.5s for 3s. Exhaust Haze lasts for 1s, and its effect only applies to Vittorio Cuniberti; while she is inside the Exhaust Haze, her Evasion Rate is increased by $2.
Every time this ship deploys Exhaust Haze: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Every 15 times this barrage scores a hit: restores 1.5% of this ship's max HP and fires a $1 special wave of torpedoes (DMG is based on the skill's level).

19960.name: Insight Upon a Starry Night
19960.desc: Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1 and decreases her shelling DMG taken by $2 from enemies slower than her. While Vittorio Cuniberti is within Exhaust Haze, her FP and TRP is increased by $3, but she cannot receive the effects of Smokescreen skills.

19970.name: 金狮-基地航空属性-ID占位

19972.name: 金狮-基地航空属性-ID占位

19974.name: 金狮-基地航空属性-ID占位

19976.name: 金狮-基地航空属性-ID占位

19980.name: Chargeburst

19990.name: Bladebreaker's Bastion
19990.desc: Increases this ship's ACC and RLD by $1 and decreases this ship's torpedo DMG taken by $2. During battle, when this ship takes DMG: $1 chance to decreases that DMG instance by 70.0%. When this ship's HP falls below 50.0%: deploys a barrier (lasting 5s; 20s cooldown between activations) that can negate DMG equal to $1 of this ship's max HP; increases this ship's EVA by $1 while this shield exists.

20011.name: All Out Assault I
20011.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Farragut Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20012.name: All Out Assault II
20012.desc: Activates All Out Assault II: Farragut Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20021.name: All Out Assault I
20021.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Mahan Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20022.name: All Out Assault II
20022.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Mahan Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20031.name: All Out Assault I
20031.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Gridley Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20032.name: All Out Assault II
20032.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Gridley Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20041.name: All Out Assault I
20041.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Fletcher Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20042.name: All Out Assault II
20042.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Fletcher Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20051.name: All Out Assault I
20051.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Sims Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20052.name: All Out Assault II
20052.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Sims Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20061.name: All Out Assault I
20061.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Benson Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20062.name: All Out Assault II
20062.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Benson Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20071.name: All Out Assault I
20071.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Gearing Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20072.name: All Out Assault II
20072.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Gearing Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20081.name: All Out Assault I
20081.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Allen M. Sumner-class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20082.name: All Out Assault II
20082.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Allen M. Sumner-class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20091.name: All Out Assault I
20091.desc: Activates All Out Assault I: Edsall-class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20092.name: All Out Assault II
20092.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Edsall-class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20111.name: All Out Assault I
20111.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Omaha Class once every 12 times the Main Guns are fired.

20112.name: All Out Assault II
20112.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Omaha Class once every 8 times the Main Guns are fired.

20121.name: All Out Assault I
20121.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Brooklyn Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20122.name: All Out Assault II
20122.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Brooklyn Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20131.name: All Out Assault I
20131.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Atlanta Class once every 12 times the Main Guns are fired.

20132.name: All Out Assault II
20132.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Atlanta Class once every 8 times the Main Guns are fired.

20133.name: All Out Assault III
20133.desc: Activates All Out Assault III: Atlanta Class once every 16 times the Main Guns are fired.

20141.name: All Out Assault I
20141.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Cleveland Class once every 15 times the Main Guns are fired.

20142.name: All Out Assault II
20142.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Cleveland Class once every 10 times the Main Guns are fired.

20211.name: All Out Assault I
20211.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Pensacola Class once every 12 times the Main Guns are fired.

20212.name: All Out Assault II
20212.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅱ: Pensacola Class once every 8 times the Main Guns are fired.

20221.name: All Out Assault I
20221.desc: Activates All Out Assault Ⅰ: Northampton Class once every 12 times the Main Guns are fired.

101090.desc_get: Every 20 seconds, 20.0% chance (40.0% when fully upgraded) to launch a powerful barrage. Power based on skill level.
101090.name: Lacy Dance
101090.desc: $1 chance to activate every 20 seconds, fires a strong barrage ($2).

101100.name: Tänzerin Trombe
101100.desc: Each main gun hit increases own torpedo critical chance by $1, stacking up to 20 times. All stacks are consumed after firing torpedoes.

101110.desc_get: Every 20 seconds, 20.0% chance (40.0% when fully upgraded) to launch a powerful barrage. Reduce Speed of each enemy hit for 8 seconds.
101110.name: Getter Ravine
101110.desc: $1 chance to activate every 20 seconds, fires a strong barrage ($2) that has a chance to slow enemies for 8 seconds.

101120.name: Darjeeling Rotation
101120.desc: Every 15 seconds, switches between the following effects: 1) Reduces damage taken by $1, 2) Increases damage dealt by $2, 3) Restores $3 HP every 3 seconds.

101130.desc_get: Every 20 seconds, 20.0% chance (40.0% when fully upgraded) to unleash an airstrike with special aviation. Power based on level.
101130.name: Rainy Ratnapura
101130.desc: $1 chance to activate every 20 seconds, launch a special airstrike ($2).

104010.name: Kizuna Beam
104010.desc: Every 20s: this ship performs super A.I. hacking to decrease the FP, TRP, and AVI of all enemies by a large amount (up to $1) for 8s... Also has a small chance to accidentally increase the stats of all enemies instead.

104020.name: Crisis Prevention!
104020.desc: When this ship takes DMG: $1 chance to fire a special torpedo barrage and avoid all enemy attacks for 3s. Once the effect ends: increases this ship's EVA by $2 for 3s.

104030.name: Connected
104030.desc: For each Kizuna AI in your fleet (excluding this ship) at the start of the battle: increases this ship's FP by $1 (can be stacked up to 4 times.) If there are no other Kizuna AIs in your fleet: decreases the DMG this ship takes by $2 for 30s after the battle starts.

104040.name: Everything Is In Order
104040.desc: Decreases the duration this ship Burns by 3s and decreases the HE DMG it takes by $1.

104050.name: Future Base
104050.desc: 30s, 45s, and 60s after the start of the battle: launches a $1 special airstrike. Airstrike damage is based on the skill's level.

104060.name: Melty World
104060.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike while sortied with Kizuna AI: $1 chance for the Airstrike to deal double DMG.

104070.name: Super AIming Adjustments
104070.desc: Increases this ship's Main Gun Crit Rate by $1 but increases its Spread Range by 1. Every 16s after the start of the battle: $2 chance to fire a special barrage. Barrage damage is based on the skill's level.

104080.name: Coercion Assistance Mode
104080.desc: Increases this ship's Accuracy and EVA by $1 through the use of advanced super A.I. tracking.

105010.name: Mach 2.42 Blossom
105010.desc: Dive Bombers can be equipped in this ship's third gear slot, and will use the "Mach 2.42 Bermbew Sprawt" gear skin, but Airstrike load time increases by 100.0%. Every 20s: launches a $1 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level and this ship's TRP stat.)

105020.name: Two-Faced Fox
105020.desc: Increases this ship's FP by $1 at the start of the battle. If the fleet this ship is in has sunk 3 enemy fleets on the map: also increases this ship's TRP by $2.

105030.name: Dream☆Story
105030.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage that Burns enemies. DMG is based on the skill's level.

105040.name: Beneath the Deep Blue Sky
105040.desc: Decreases DMG taken by Hololive ships by $2. Every 20s: for 8s, decreases the Speed of all onscreen enemies by $1, increases the Accuracy of all your ships by $1, and increases the Speed of all your Hololive ships by $1.

105050.name: Shut-in Maid
105050.desc: Decreases this boat's OXY by $1. For 20s after entering battle: increases this boat's DMG by $2. When this boat retreats from battle: increases its Speed by 100.0%.

105060.name: Failen Angel
105060.desc: When entering battle: applies 1 randomly chosen buff to your fleet. The buff's effect is increased to 150% for Hololive ships.

105070.name: Promise to the Sunflower
105070.desc: When entering battle: fires a special guaranteed $1 Critical Hit barrage. When there are 3 or more Hololive ships in the same fleet: improves the barrage.

105080.name: The Summer Flower We Watch
105080.desc: Every 25s: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage.

105090.name: The Third Day of Flirting
105090.desc: At the start of the battle: if there are an odd number of Hololive ships in your fleet: increases this ship's Main Gun DMG by $1. If their number is even: decreases the Main Gun DMG this ship takes by $2. 20s after the start of the battle: randomly chooses 1 of your ships and decreases the DMG they take by $2 for 10s.

105100.name: Oni Goddess☆Nakiri
105100.desc: Every 20s: $2 chance for this ship to buff itself using its spirits. When successfully procced: increases this ship's DMG dealt by $1. Can be stacked up to 3 times.

105110.name: Demon Cutter Asura-Rakshasa
