105110.desc: Every $1s: activates Demon Cutter Asura-Rakshasa $2 and gives this ship an 50.0% chance to inflict Armor Break (affected targets take more Main Gun DMG) to hit enemies for 6s. Slash DMG is based on the skill's level.

105120.name: The Wave of a Pleasant Dream
105120.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: $1 chance to create a wave of light for 8s which decreases the DMG enemies deal by $2.

105130.name: MP Burst - Explosion
105130.desc: Every 8s: gain 1 MP. When this ship has accumulated 3 MP: fires a $1 special barrage, and resets MP to 0.

105140.name: Wild Dualism
105140.desc: When this ship launches an odd-numbered Airstrike: launches an additional Torpedo Bomber airstrike $1. When launching an even-numbered Airstrike: launches an additional Dive Bomber airstrike $1. Airstrike DMG is based on the skill's level.

105150.name: Tarot Card Divination
105150.desc: At the start of the battle: makes a divination that applies a randomly chosen $1 buff to this ship.

106010.name: Rose's Thorns
106010.desc: After the battle starts: for 60s, increases this ship's FP and TRP by $3. When this ship takes DMG: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage that always crits (DMG is based on the skill's level; 10s cooldown between activations.)

106020.name: Vibrant Minuet
106020.desc: Increases the DMG of this ship's first 3 torpedo launches of each battle by $1. When this ship fires its Torpedoes: for 8s, increases your Vanguard's Speed by 3 and EVA by $2 for the ship in the frontmost position of your Vanguard.

106030.name: Rock-Paper-Cannon Salvo
106030.desc: Increases this ship's FP by $1 and damage against Light Armor enemies by $3. 5s after this ship fires its Main Guns: fires a randomly chosen $2 barrage using special ammo.

106040.name: Super Mega Explosion
106040.desc: When this ship fires its Main Guns: heals 2 random ships in your fleet for 5.0% of their max HP and, with a $1 chance, fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level.)

106050.name: Sakura Petal Dance
106050.desc: Every 15s after the start of the battle, and every time this ship lands 6 hits with its Torpedoes: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level.)

106060.name: Misty Mirror Flower
106060.desc: When this ship sinks an enemy: increases this ship's FP and RLD by $1 (can be stacked up to 3 times.) Additionally, after this ship sinks 3 enemies: increases this ship's Accuracy by $2 for the rest of the battle.

106070.name: Humble Part-Timer
106070.desc: After the battle starts: for 60s, increases this ship's FP and its DMG against Light Armor enemies by $1. If there are other Venus Vacation characters in the same fleet: increases this ship's AA by $2 and decreases its Main Gun DMG taken by $3.

106080.name: Venus Friends
106080.desc: Every 20s after the start of the battle: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level.) Enemies hit by this barrage take $2 more DMG from Venus Vacation characters for 8s.

106090.name: Not-So-Gentle Sister
106090.desc: Every 18s after the start of the battle: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level.) Enemies hit by this barrage take $3 more DMG from Misaki and Nagisa for 8s.

106100.name: Venus' Unpredictability
106100.desc: Decreases the DMG this ship takes by $1. When this ship fires its Main Guns: decreases the Speed of a random enemy by $2 for 8s.

106110.name: Joker Card
106110.desc: Every 15s after the start of the battle: fires a $1 barrage using special ammo and poker ammo (DMG is based on the skill's level.) Enemies hit by the special ammo take 10.0% increased DMG for 6s.

106120.name: Royal Flush
106120.desc: Increases the Shell Velocity of this ship's equipped Main Gun by 10.0%. When 5 enemy aircraft are shot down within the fleet's AA range: increases this ship's TRP and AA by $1.

106130.name: Dance of the Heavens
106130.desc: 5s after this ship finishes loading its Airstrike: launches a $1 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level.)

106140.name: Hanakagura
106140.desc: Increases this ship's DMG against BBs by $1. When this ship launches an Airstrike: $2 chance to decrease DMG taken for 8s by a random ship in your Vanguard.

106150.name: Scholar's Ocean Investigation
106150.desc: When this ship launches an airstrike: launches an additional $1 airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit by this special airstrike suffer a minus 3.0% AA debuff and take $2 increased DMG from this ship for 6s.

106160.name: Hunger After Work
106160.desc: When the battle starts: increases this ship's AVI by $1. Decreases the loading time of this ship's first 2 airstrikes by 50.0%, but increases the loading time by 50.0% for the 3rd airstrike and onwards.

106170.name: Rose's Thorns+
106170.desc: When this ship is attacked: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage that always deals Critical DMG (DMG is based on the skill's level; 10s cooldown between activations). Enemies hit by this barrage take 15.0% more cannon and torpedo DMG from this ship for 5s (cannot be stacked). 60s after the battle starts: increases this ship's FP and TRP by $3.

106180.name: Rose's Waltz
106180.desc: For the first 60s of battle: increases this ship's RLD by 15.0%; once this effect ends, decreases this ship's DMG taken by 15.0% until the battle ends.

106190.name: Hunger After Work+
106190.desc: Increases this ship's AVI by $1. Decreases the loading time of this ship's first 2 airstrikes by 50.0%.

106200.name: Joyous Dinnertime
106200.desc: For the first 30s of battle: increases this ship's ACC by 10.0%; once this effect ends, decreases this ship's DMG taken by 10.0% until the battle ends.

106210.name: Super Mega Explosion+
106210.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns: 2 random ships in your fleet recover 5.0% of their max HP and, with a $1 chance, fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

106220.name: Fatal☆Delphinium
106220.desc: For the first 50s of battle: increases this ship's ACC by 10.0%; once this effect ends, this ship recovers 5.0% of her max HP.

106230.name: Brilliant Lapis
106230.desc: For the first 50s of battle: decreases this ship's DMG taken by 5.0%; once this effect ends, this ship recovers 3.0% of her max HP.

106240.name: Misty Mirror Flower+
106240.desc: When this ship sinks an enemy: increases this ship's FP and RLD by $1 (can be stacked up to 3 times); once per battle, when she has sunk 3 enemies: increases this ship's ACC by $2 until the battle ends. When the battle starts, if this ship is in the frontmost position of your Vanguard: applies the above-mentioned ACC buff and increases this ship's DMG dealt by $3 until the battle ends.

106250.name: Souffle Attack
106250.desc: For the first 40s of battle: increases this ship's FP by 10.0%; once this effect ends, increases this ship's RLD by 10.0% until the battle ends.

106260.name: Venus' Unpredictability+
106260.desc: Decreases this ship's DMG taken by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: targets a random enemy and reduces its SPD by $2 and EVA by $3 for 8s.

106270.name: Tengu's Fan
106270.desc: For the first 40s of battle: increases this ship's DMG dealt by 10.0%; once this effect ends, decreases this ship's DMG taken by 5.0% until the battle ends.

106280.name: Hanakagura+
106280.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt against BBs by $1. When this ship launches an airstrike: $2 chance to decrease the frontmost ship in your Vanguard's DMG taken by $3 for 8s.

106290.name: Royal Flush+
106290.desc: Increases the Shell Velocity of this ship's equipped Main Gun by 10.0%. When 5 enemy aircraft are shot down in your fleet's AA Range: increases your Vanguard's TRP and AA by $1.

106300.name: Black Jack
106300.desc: For the first 21s of battle: increases this ship's AA by 15.0%; once this effect ends, this ship's DMG dealt increases by 15.0% until the battle ends.

106310.name: Iconic Direction
106310.desc: For the first 30s of battle: decreases this ship's DMG taken by 20.0%; once this effect ends, increases the AA of all your Venus Vacation collab characters by 15.0% until the battle ends.

106320.name: Fitting Time
106320.desc: While this ship is afloat: decreases all enemies' FP and TRP by $2. Every 16s: spawns a barrier (lasts 8s; can negate up to 3.0% of the recipient's max HP in DMG) around 2 random Venus Vacation collab characters. Sets this ship's Secondary Gun Range to 80 and, when she fires her Secondary Guns: decreases a random enemy's SPD by $1 for 3s (8s cooldown between activations).

106330.name: lisianthus Halation
106330.desc: Increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1 and increases her FP and ACC by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a $3 barrage that inflicts Armor Break to enemies hit (DMG is based on the skill's level).

106340.name: lisianthus Halation +
106340.desc: Increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1 and increases her FP and ACC by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a $3 barrage that inflicts Armor Break to enemies hit (DMG is based on the skill's level). The first time each battle that this ship fires her Secondary Guns: also fires the above special barrage.

106350.name: Delicious Crepes
106350.desc: For the first 60s of battle: restores 1.5% of this ship's max HP once every 10s; once this effect ends, decreases this ship's DMG taken by 5.0% until the battle ends.

106360.name: Humble Part-Timer+
106360.desc: 60s after the battle starts: increases this ship's FP and DMG dealt to Light Armor enemies by $1 and increases her cannon DMG dealt by $3. When the battle starts, if there is another Venus Vacation collab character in your fleet: increases this ship's AA by $2 and decreases her cannon DMG taken by $3.

106370.name: Handmade Bento
106370.desc:
At the start of battle: increases the fleet's FP, AA, and EVA by $1 (this effect lasts until Shizuku's next Main Gun attack).
Whenever Shizuku fires her Main Guns: increases the fleet's FP, AA, and EVA based on her Main Guns' reloading time (1.0% increase for every $2s spent reloading); this effect lasts until the next time this ship fires her Main Guns.

106380.name: Foxy Cosplay
106380.desc:
Increases this ship's FP by $1. Whenever this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).
Every 10s during battle: restores $4 Max HP to the ally with the lowest current percentage of HP and another random ally.
Once per battle, when an ally falls below 20.0% Max HP as a result of DMG taken, restores 8.0% of Shizuku's Max HP to that ship. When this effect activates: this skill's special barrage is enhanced until the end of battle, increases this ship's FP by 5.0%, then immediately fires this barrage again.

106390.name: Foxy Cosplay+
106390.desc:
Increases this ship's FP by $1. Whenever this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).
Every 10s during battle: restores $4 Max HP to the ally with the lowest current percentage of HP and another random ally; if the target of this restoration effect is under 33.0% Max HP, the amount restored is increased by 50.0%.
Once per battle, when an ally falls below 20.0% Max HP as a result of DMG taken, restores 8.0% of Shizuku's Max HP to that ship. When this effect activates: this skill's special barrage is enhanced until the end of battle, increases this ship's FP by 5.0%, then immediately fires this barrage again.

106400.name: Host of the Harvest Festival
106400.desc: For 30s after the start of battle: restores 1.0% of the fleet's Max HP every 15s; afterwards, reduces the DMG this ship takes by 5.0% until the end of battle.

106410.name: Neon Pink Burst
106410.desc: At the start of battle, increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. Every 15s after the start of battle: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level), inflicting Armor Break on enemies hit.

106420.name: Neon Pink Burst +
106420.desc: Increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1. At the start of battle, increases this ship's FP and ACC by $2. Every 15s after the start of battle: $3 chance to fire a $4 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level), inflicting Armor Break on enemies hit. When an allied ship fires her AA guns for the first time each battle: immediately fires this barrage an additional time.

106430.name: Supporting What You "Love"!

106440.name: Bittersweet Aftertaste
106440.desc: For 15s after the start of battle: reduces this ship's SPD by 2 and increases AA by 10.0%. Afterwards, increases Secondary Gun efficiency by 10.0% until the end of battle.

106450.name: Greetings From Below
106450.desc: At the start of battle: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level), reducing the SPD of enemies hit by 20.0% for 8s.

106460.name: Greetings From Below+
106460.desc: At the start of battle: fires a $1 special barrage (improved; DMG is based on the skill's level), reducing the SPD of enemies hit by 20.0% and increasing the DMG they take from Venus Vacation ships by $2 for 8s.

106470.name: Keen Danger Senses
106470.desc: Increases this boat's OXY by $1. When this boat surfaces: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level), reducing the DMG dealt by enemies hit by 8.0% for 10s. While retreating: increases this boat's SPD by 50.0%.

106480.name: Delicious, Hearty Hamburger
106480.desc: For 20s after the start of battle: increases the wearer's SPD by 3; afterwards, reduces the DMG this ship takes by 10.0% until the end of battle.

106490.name: Elise's Tactical Guidance
106490.desc:
Every 10s: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). During battle, when another allied Main Fleet ship finishes loading a Salvo or an Airstrike: increases that ship's and Elise's DMG dealt by $2 for 8s; Furthermore, applies an additional effect based on the type of allied ship triggering this effect:
BB, BC, or BBV: increases that ship's FP by $3 for 8s;
CV, CVL, or BBV: increases that ship's AVI by $3 for 8s.
The status boost and DMG boost effects of this skill cannot be stacked.

106500.name: Instructor's Duty
106500.desc: At the start of battle, if there are two or more Venus Vacation ships in the same fleet: increases this ship's Aircraft efficiency by 5.0%. Whenever this ship launches an airstrike: launches an additional $1 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level).

106510.name: Instructor's Duty+
106510.desc:
Increases this ship's AVI by $2. At the start of battle, if there are 2 or more Venus Vacation ships in the same fleet: increases this ship's Aircraft efficiency by 5.0%.
Whenever this ship launches an airstrike: launches an additional $1 special airstrike (improved; DMG is based on the skill's level); if this is Elise's first airstrike during this battle: reduces the loading time of Venus Vacation CVs and CVLs' next airstrike by 20.0%.

106520.name: Monochromatic Mage
106520.desc: For 30s after the start of battle: increases this ship's ACC by 10.0%. Afterwards, reduces this ship's DMG taken by 10.0% until the end of battle.

106530.name: Dreamy Mixology

106540.name: Flawless Focus
106540.desc: Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. Every 20s: randomly targets one enemy, reducing its SPD by 10.0% for 16s; while there is a targeted enemy on the field: every 3s, performs a $2 special attack at that enemy, which ignores shields (DMG is based on the skill's level); every 6 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

106550.name: Flawless Focus+
106550.desc: Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. Every 20s: randomly targets one enemy (prioritizing humanoid enemies), reducing its SPD by 10.0% for 16s; while there is a targeted enemy on the field: every 3s, performs a $2 special attack at that enemy, which ignores shields (DMG is based on the skill's level); every 4 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

106560.name: Chili Crab
106560.desc: For the first 40s of battle: increases this ship's ACC by 10.0%. Afterwards, increases this ship's AA by 10.0% until the end of battle.

106570.name: Impactful Composition
106570.desc: At the start of battle, increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. For each Venus Vacation ship in the fleet (up to a maximum of 3): increases this ship's ACC and RLD by $2. Every 20s during battle: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by this barrage take 5.0% increased DMG from Tsukushi (cannot be stacked).

106580.name: Impactful Composition+
106580.desc: At the start of battle, increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. For each Venus Vacation ship in the fleet (up to a maximum of 3): increases this ship's ACC and RLD by $2. Every 20s during battle: fires an enhanced $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by this barrage take 10.0% increased DMG from Tsukushi (cannot be stacked).

106590.name: Homebody's Leisure Time
106590.desc: At the start of battle, increases this ship's EVA by $1 and generates a barrier that lasts until the end of battle; this barrier can absorb up to $2 of this ship's Max HP. When this barrier is broken: restores $3 Max HP to this ship and reduces DMG taken by 5.0% until the end of battle.

106600.name: Burst of Inspiration
106600.desc: For 45s after the start of battle: increases this ship's Crit Rate by 20.0%; When this effect ends, fires a special barrage one time only (DMG is based on the skill's level).

107010.name: Cutesy Clumsy?
107010.desc: Each second in combat, this ship has a 10.0% chance of dealing 43 DMG to herself; if this effect activates: after 3s, heals this ship and the lowest HP% ship in the fleet for $1 HP (this effect can only activate 2 times per battle).

107020.name: An Idol's Ambitions
107020.desc: When this ship fires her #$1 wave of Torpedoes in a battle: increases all enemies' DMG taken by $2 for 5s. After this effect activates, when this ship fires her Torpedoes: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $3 until the end of the battle (can be stacked 2 times).

107030.name: Positivity Burst!
107030.desc: Every 15s: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

107040.name: Cerulean Song
107040.desc: When this ship launches her first Airstrike in a battle: $1 chance (100.0% on subsequent Airstrikes) to launch a $2 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level). At the start of the battle, if there is another The Idolmaster collab ship in your fleet: increases the first activation chance to 100.0%.

107050.name: The Fruits of Labor
107050.desc: When this ship sinks an enemy: increases this ship's AVI and RLD by $1 until the end of the battle (can be stacked up to 3 times). At the start of the battle, if there is another The Idolmaster collab ship in your fleet: adds 3 stacks of this buff.

107060.name: Alongside the Ocean's Wings
107060.desc: Decreases the loading time of this ship's first Airstrike by $1. Decreases DMG taken by $2 for all The Idolmaster collab ships in your fleet.

107070.name: Iori Strike!
107070.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt to Heavy Armor enemies by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

107080.name: Iori Defense!
107080.desc: At the start of the battle: randomly chooses 1 other ship in your fleet and decreases her DMG taken by $2 for 30s. Once this effect wears off: heals that ship for $2 HP.

107090.name: Feigned Innocence?
107090.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns: $1 chance to increase this ship's Main Gun DMG by 50.0% for 3s and AA by $2 for 5s. This effect may only activate once every 5s.

107100.name: Healing Augury
107100.desc: As long as this ship is afloat: decreases your Main Fleet's DMG taken by $1. At the start of the battle: tells a fortune and receives one of the following effects: 1) Increases this ship's EVA by $2; 2) Increases this ship's Accuracy by $3; 3) Increases this ship's FP by $4; 4) Heals this ship for $5 HP.

107110.name: Directionally Challenged
107110.desc: Every 20s after the battle starts: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If your Vanguard consists of only this ship when this barrage activates: this ship becomes lost and stops in place (Speed drops to 0) for 2s.

107120.name: Fleet Course Management
107120.desc: 5s after the battle starts, as well as every 20s: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit by this barrage take $2 more DMG from The Idolmaster collab ships for 5s. At the start of the battle, if there are no more than 3 The Idolmaster collab ships in your fleet: increases this ship's FP by 100.0% and improves this barrage.

107130.name: Logistics Buddy
107130.desc: When this ship has Cargo equipped: decreases the time this ship Burns by 3s and decreases your Flagship's Burn DMG taken by $1, but also decreases this ship's Speed by 3.

107140.name: Prankster's Cheer - Ami
107140.desc: When this boat enters the battle: decreases the Speed of a random ship in your Vanguard by 1 for 1s, then heals said ship for 100 HP and increases her EVA by $1 for 20s.

107150.name: Double Trouble - Ami
107150.desc: At the start of the battle: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

107160.name: Prankster's Cheer - Mami
107160.desc: When this boat enters the battle: decreases the Speed of a random ship in your Main Fleet by 1 for 1s, then heals said ship for 100 HP and increases her Accuracy by $1 for 20s.

107170.name: Double Trouble - Mami
107170.desc: At the start of the battle: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108010.name: Grid Beam
108010.desc: When the battle starts: for 90s, increases this ship's FP by $1. Every 20s: fires a $2 Grid Beam (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this ship has the Battle Tracto Max or Buster Borr equipped, or if this ship is sortied with Namiko or Hass: enhances this skill.

108020.name: Slash & Circus
108020.desc: When the battle starts: for 90s, increases this ship's AA by $1 and decreases her cannon DMG taken by $2. 5s after the battle starts, and every 30s: fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this ship has the Gridman Calibur or Sky Vitter equipped, or if this ship is sortied with Namiko or Hass: enhances this skill.

108030.name: Grid Fixer Beam
108030.desc: 40s after the battle starts: fires a $1 Grid Fixer Beam (DMG is based on the skill's level) and heals your fleet 3 times for 1.0% max HP per tick. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: heals your fleet.

108040.name: Energy Pulse
108040.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108050.name: Instance Abreaction
108050.desc: Every 20s: activates "Instance Abreaction" and launches a $1 special airstrike (DMG is based on this ship's FP stat and the skill's level; airstrike deals cannon-type DMG).

108060.name: Ever-Burning Flame
108060.desc: Increases this ship's FP by $1. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken: increases this ship's FP by 10.0% and heals this ship 4 times for 2.0% max HP per tick.

108070.name: Calibur End
108070.desc: Every 20s: executes a $1 Gridman Calibur slashing attack and spawns a shield that lasts 8s and can block up to 10 shots (slashing attack DMG is based on the skill's level).

108080.name: Tanker Cannon
108080.desc: Enhances this ship's Secondary Guns using the Battle Tracto Max. Every 15s: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108090.name: Coordinated Volley
108090.desc: Every 10 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special missile barrage using the Buster Borr, and deploys a smokescreen that lasts 5s (DMG is based on the skill's level). When your ship(s) enters the smokescreen: puts out any normal Burn status ailment for that ship(s).

108100.name: Amp Laser Circus
108100.desc: 5s after the battle starts, and with a $3 chance every 20s after that: fires a $1 laser barrage using the Sky Vittor, and increases this ship's AA by $2 (AA buff can be stacked up to 2 times per battle).

108110.name: Blazing Inferno Rex Roar
108110.desc: Every 20 times this ship fires her Secondary Guns: fires a $1 Blazing Inferno Rex Roar (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108120.name: Something Beam
108120.desc: When the battle starts: for 90s, increases this ship's EVA by $1. Every 18s: fires a $2 beam using the Penetrator Gun which inflicts Armor Break to Heavy Armor enemies hit (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108130.name: Dynazenon Full Burst
108130.desc: Every 10 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108140.name: Ride the Wind
108140.desc: This ship starts the battle with 1 Airstrike ready. Every battle, when this ship launches her 2nd Airstrike and onwards: launches an additional $1 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108150.name: Take to the Skies
108150.desc: Every battle, when this ship launches her 1st and 3rd Airstrikes: launches a $1 bombing raid using the Goldburn, and spawns a shield around your Vanguard that lasts 10s, reduces your Vanguard's DMG taken by 8.0%, and can block up to 15 shots (Goldburn DMG is based on the skill's level).

108160.name: Instance Domination: Wings
108160.desc: Every 20s: uses $1 Instance Domination to seize control of Siren aircraft and make them attack enemies (DMG is based on the skill's level; aircraft deal cannon-type DMG).

108170.name: Instance Domination: Flames
108170.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns: uses $1 Instance Domination to seize control of Siren weaponry and make them attack enemies (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108210.name: Grid Beam+
108210.desc: When the battle starts: for 90s, increases this ship's FP by $1. Every 20s: fires a $2 Grid Beam (DMG is based on the skill's level). If this ship has the Battle Tracto Max or Buster Borr equipped, or if this ship is sortied with Namiko or Hass: enhances the Grid Beam.

108220.name: Energy Pulse+
108220.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108230.name: Tanker Cannon+
108230.desc: Enhances this ship's Secondary Guns using the Battle Tracto Max. Every 15s: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108240.name: Coordinated Volley+
108240.desc: Every 6 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $1 special missile barrage using the Buster Borr, and deploys a smokescreen that lasts 5s (DMG is based on the skill's level). When your ship(s) enters the smokescreen: puts out any normal Burn status ailment for that ship(s).

108250.name: Something Beam+
108250.desc: When the battle starts: for 90s, increases this ship's EVA by $1 and decreases the DMG taken by 8.0%. Every 18s: fires a $2 beam using the Penetrator Gun which inflicts Armor Break to Heavy Armor enemies hit (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108260.name: Take to the Skies+
108260.desc: Every battle, when this ship launches her 1st and 3rd Airstrikes: launches a $1 bombing raid using the Big Goldburn, and spawns a shield around your Vanguard that lasts 10s, reduces your Vanguard's DMG taken by 8.0%, and can block up to 15 shots (Big Goldburn DMG is based on the skill's level).

108270.name: Instance Domination: Flames+
108270.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns: uses $1 Instance Domination to seize control of Siren weaponry and make them attack enemies (DMG is based on the skill's level).

108280.name: Sounderous Full Blast+
108280.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to perform a $3 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level and this ship's FP stat).

108290.name: Hang in There!+
108290.desc: When the battle starts, and every 20s: increases this ship's and your frontmost Vanguard ship's FP and ACC by $1 for 10s (if the recipient is an SSSS collab character, instead increases FP and ACC by $2; effect does not stack if this ship is the frontmost ship). If this ship has Cargo equipped: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $3, but decreases her SPD by 1.

108300.name: Sounderous Full Blast
108300.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to perform a $3 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level and this ship's FP stat).

108310.name: Melodic Blaster
108310.desc: Increases this ship's AVI by $1. Every 20s: performs a $2 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level and this ship's AVI stat) and restores $3 HP of one random ship in your Vanguard.

108320.name: Hang in There!
108320.desc: When the battle starts, and every 20s: increases this ship's and your frontmost Vanguard ship's FP and ACC by $1 for 10s (effect does not stack if this ship is the frontmost ship). If this ship has Cargo equipped: decreases this ship's DMG taken by $2, but decreases her SPD by 1.

108330.name: Promises, Love, and Expiration Dates
108330.desc: Every 10s: fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by the barrage take $2 increased DMG from your SSSS collab characters.

108340.name: Crab (With Receipt)
108340.desc: When equipped by Princess Hime: increases your SSSS collab characters' FP and TRP by 8.0%.

108350.name: Dragon Figurine
108350.desc: When equipped by Princess Hime: increases Princess Hime's, Yume Minami's, Chise Asukagawa's, The 2nd's, and Mujina's FP and AVI by 8.0%.

108410.name: Primal Accepter
108410.desc: Increases this ship's FP and TRP by 15.0%. 3s after the battle starts: summons Gridman (Universe Fighter) to fight for 15s.

108420.name: Confinement Program
108420.desc: 15s after the battle starts: summons Alexis Kerib (New Order) to fight for 30s.

108430.name: Battle Tracto Max Upgrade
108430.desc: Every battle, when this ship fires her 3rd Main Gun volley: increases this ship's FP by 10.0% until the battle ends.

108440.name: Buster Borr Upgrade
108440.desc: Every battle, when this ship fires her 2nd wave of torpedoes: increases this ship's TRP by 12.0% until the battle ends.

108450.name: Dyna Wing
108450.desc: 15s after the battle starts: summons Dynazenon to fight for 15s. When the effect of "Primal Accepter" activates: if sortied with Chise Asukagawa who has the "Big Goldburn Zentangle" equipped: instead summons Rogue Kaiser Gridman, but for 15s, this ship and Rikka Takarada cannot attack and their skills cannot activate.

108460.name: Big Goldburn Zentangle
108460.desc: When the battle starts, increases this ship's AVI by 8.0%. If sortied with Rikka Takarada and Yume Minami: strengthens Gridman summoned by the skill "Primal Accepter".

108470.name: Kaiju Seed
108470.desc: 5s after the battle starts: uses Instance Domination to seize control of 2 Siren aircraft and make them attack enemies.

108480.name: Sounderous
108480.desc: Every 25s: summons Kaiju Battleship Sounderous (Fortress Mode) to perform a supporting attack.

108490.name: Supporting Roar
108490.desc: Every 30s: summons Dynazenon to perform a supporting attack.

109010.name: Shining Blast
109010.desc: When this ship's Item attack hits an enemy, if your fleet has 6 or more AP: consumes 6 AP and activates "Shining Blast" $1 (DMG is based on the skill's level; 3s cooldown between activations).

109020.name: Alchemy Teacher
109020.desc: When sortied with one or more "Atelier Ryza" collab characters, makes their Item attacks stronger and increases their Crit Rate by $1; enemies who have been Item Marked take $2 more DMG from "Atelier Ryza" collab characters.

109030.name: Grand Chariot
109030.desc: Every 4 times this ship fires her Main Guns: your fleet gains 8 AP. Increases this ship's FP, AA, and EVA by $1.

109040.name: Grand Chariot+
109040.desc: Every 4 times this ship fires her Main Guns: your fleet gains 10 AP. Increases this ship's FP, AA, and EVA by $1. The second time this ship's "Shining Blast" skill activates, activates "Fatal Drive - Grand Chariot" $2 (DMG is based on the level of this ship's "Grand Chariot" skill).

109050.name: Frozen Lily
109050.desc: Every 10s, if your fleet has 10 or more AP: consumes 10 AP and activates "Frozen Lily" $1 (DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit by this skill are slowed by 15.0% for 5s.

109060.name: Blessed Melody
109060.desc: When the battle starts: your fleet gains 10 AP, all ships in your fleet recover $1 of their max HP, and all your "Atelier Ryza" collab characters recover an additional 2.0% of their max HP. When this ship launches an Airstrike: your Vanguard recovers $2 of their max HP and all your "Atelier Ryza" collab characters recover an additional 2.0% of their max HP. Once per battle, when a ship in your fleet falls below 30.0% max HP as a result of DMG taken: that ship recovers $3 of her max HP and your fleet gains 10 AP.

109070.name: White Requiem
109070.desc: Increases this ship's AVI and ACC by $1. Every 8s: your fleet gains 8 AP.

109080.name: White Requiem+
109080.desc: Increases this ship's AVI and ACC by $1. Every 8s: your fleet gains 8 AP. The second time this ship's "Frozen Lily" skill activates, activates "Fatal Drive - White Requiem" $2 (DMG is based on the level of this ship's "White Requiem" skill).

109090.name: Red Flame Slash
109090.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns, if your fleet has 10 or more AP: consumes 10 AP and activates "Red Flame Slash" $1 (DMG is based on the skill's level). The slashing part of this attack always deals Critical DMG; this ship recovers HP equal to $2 of the DMG dealt to the enemy.

109100.name: Arms Enchantment
109100.desc: Increases this ship's EVA by $2. Increases this ship's DMG dealt (by up to 20.0%) the lower her current HP is. Increases "Atelier Ryza" collab characters' Crit Rate by $1 against enemies who have been Item Marked. The first time one of your Main Fleet "Atelier Ryza" collab characters uses an AP-consuming skill: increases that skill's power.

109110.name: Flawless Desire
109110.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. Every 9s: your fleet gains 5 AP.

109120.name: Flawless Desire+
109120.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. Every 9s: your fleet gains 10 AP. The second time this ship's "Red Flame Slash" skill activates, activates "Fatal Drive - Flawless Desire" $2 (DMG is based on the level of this ship's "Flawless Desire" skill).

109130.name: Wild Growth
109130.desc: When this ship gains a stack of Wood Element: activates "Wild Growth" $1 (DMG is based on the skill's level; 5s cooldown between activations).

109140.name: Spirit Gift
109140.desc: Your "Atelier Ryza" collab characters take $1 less cannon and torpedo DMG from enemies who have been Item Marked. When an AP-consuming skill activates, or when this ship launches an Airstrike: this ship gains 1 stack of Wood Element (only 1 Wood Element can be gained per second; up to 5 stacks can be stored). Increases this ship's DMG dealt by $2 and decreases her DMG taken by 1.0% for each stack of Wood Element.

109150.name: Eternity Bloom
109150.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: your fleet gains 5 AP. Increases this ship's AVI by 5.0% and AA by $1.

109160.name: Eternity Bloom+
109160.desc: When this ship launches an Airstrike: your fleet gains 5 AP. Increases this ship's AVI by 5.0% and AA by $1. Once per battle, when this ship has gained 5 stacks of Wood Element: resets all stacks and activates "Fatal Drive - Eternity Bloom" $2 (DMG is based on the level of this ship's "Eternity Bloom" skill).

109170.name: Elemental Link
109170.desc: When this ship fires her Main Guns, if your fleet has 5 or more AP: consumes 5 AP and this ship gains a fire, ice, lightning, or wind Elemental Spirit (chosen randomly from one of the unobtained Elemental Spirits) and performs a $1 elemental attack of the corresponding element (5s cooldown between activations).

109180.name: Elemental Power
109180.desc: Every 10s: increases this ship's EVA by $1 (can be stacked up to 3 times). Increases this ship's DMG dealt by $2 for each Elemental Spirit she possesses.

109190.name: Einzelkampf
109190.desc: When this ship fires her Torpedoes: your fleet gains 8 AP. Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1.

109200.name: Einzelkampf+
109200.desc: When this ship fires her Torpedoes: your fleet gains 10 AP. Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. The fourth time this ship's "Elemental Link" skill activates: removes all Elemental Spirits obtained from the "Elemental Link" skill and activates "Fatal Drive - Einzelkampf" $2 (DMG is based on the level of this ship's "Einzelkampf" skill).

109210.name: Dark Spirit
109210.desc: Every 6 times this ship fires her Secondary Gun, if your fleet has 10 or more AP: consumes 10 AP and activates "Dark Spirit" $1. When the battle starts, if this ship is in the frontmost position of your Vanguard and there are other ships afloat in your Vanguard when "Dark Spirit" activates: adds a Dark Element to the ship in the rearmost position; if this ship is NOT in the frontmost position when "Dark Spirit" activates: adds a Dark Element to the ship in the frontmost position. A ship with a Dark Element takes 50 DMG and deals $2 more DMG for 5s.

109220.name: Holy Trail
109220.desc: Increases this ship's AA and EVA by $1. When the battle starts, if this ship is in the frontmost position of your Vanguard and there are other ships afloat in your Vanguard: adds a Light Element to the ship in the rearmost position of your Vanguard whenever an Item attack hits an enemy; if this ship is NOT in the frontmost position: adds a Light Element to the ship in the frontmost position whenever an Item attack hits an enemy. A ship with a Light Element recovers 5.0% of her max HP. This skill has a 12s cooldown between activations.

109230.name: Luna Judgment
109230.desc: Every 4 times this ship fires her Main Guns: your fleet gains 10 AP. Increases this ship's DMG dealt against Sirens by $1.

109240.name: Luna Judgment+
109240.desc: Every 2 times this ship fires her Main Guns: your fleet gains 10 AP. Increases this ship's DMG dealt against Sirens by $1. The third time this ship's "Dark Spirit" skill activates: activates "Fatal Drive - Luna Judgment" $2 (DMG is based on the level of this ship's "Luna Judgment" skill) and adds a Luna Element to all "Atelier Ryza" collab characters excluding this one. Within 3s of gaining a Luna Element, if that character takes DMG that would sink her: that character does not sink, recovers 3.0% of her max HP, and evades all attacks for 3s.

109310.name: Radiance
109310.desc: Activates the effect of a random Item when the battle starts.

109320.name: Ray of Light
109320.desc: The ship with this gear equipped has a 50.0% chance of gaining 10 AP when her Item effect activates.

109330.name: Proud Act
109330.desc: When the ship with this gear equipped falls below 30.0% max HP as a result of DMG taken: increases that ship's Evasion Rate by 5.0% until the battle ends.

109340.name: Blooming Flowers
109340.desc: When the battle starts: the ship with this gear equipped takes 5.0% less DMG and deals 10.0% more DMG for 50s.

109350.name: Elemental Song
109350.desc: When the ship with this gear equipped gains an Elemental Spirit: decreases her DMG taken by 2.0% (can be stacked up to 4 times; this buff persists even if all Elemental Spirits are removed).

109360.name: Immortal Lily
109360.desc: Once per battle, when the ship with this gear equipped takes DMG that would sink her: 50.0% chance to negate that DMG and for this ship to evade all attacks for 5s, after which she recovers 200 HP.

110010.name: Twin Blades - Followup Slash
desc_get_add: ,If this special attack sinks an enemy: performs Twin Blades - Followup Slash again (10s cooldown between activations).
110010.desc:
When the battle starts: increases this ship's Crit DMG by $1 for every Senran Kagura collab character in your fleet(can be stacked up to 3 times).
Every 12s: applies a debuff to the enemy with the lowest HP remaining, increasing their DMG taken from Senran Kagura collab characters by $2, and performs a $3 special attack - Twin Blades - Followup Slash (DMG is based on the skill's level and this ship's FP and TRP stats). When this attack activates, if there is only 1 enemy on the battlefield: this attack deals guaranteed Crit DMG. $4
desc_add: ,If this special attack sinks an enemy: performs Twin Blades - Followup Slash again (10s cooldown between activations).

110020.name: Twin Blades Combo Strike
110020.desc:
Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken: increases this ship's Evasion Rate by $2 and performs a $3 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level and this ship's FP and TRP stats). Restores this ship's HP equal to 12.0% of the DMG dealt by this attack.
When this attack activates, if there is only 1 enemy on the battlefield: this attack deals guaranteed Crit DMG.

110030.name: Twin Blades Combo Strike+
desc_get_add: ,If Hanzō-Style Full Bloom sinks an enemy: additionally performs Twin Blades - Followup Slash 3 times.
110030.desc:
Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. When the battle starts, if there is another Senran Kagura collab character in your fleet: increases this ship's EVA by $1.
Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken: increases this ship's Evasion Rate by $2 and performs a $3 Secret Ninja Art: Hanzō-Style Full Bloom (DMG is based on the skill's level and this ship's FP and TRP stats). Restores this ship's HP equal to 15.0% of the DMG dealt by this Secret Ninja Art.
When this Secret Ninja Art activates, if there is only 1 enemy on the battlefield: this attack deals guaranteed Crit DMG. $4
desc_add: ,If Hanzō-Style Full Bloom sinks an enemy: additionally performs Twin Blades - Followup Slash 3 times.

110040.name: Fierce Sky Phoenix Flash
110040.desc:
Every 25s: this ship stops in place for 3s and fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). 
When this ship stops in place as a result of this skill: deploys a barrier (lasts 3s) capable of blocking up to 2.0% of this ship's max HP in DMG; if this shield expires: performs a $2 special slash attack (DMG is based on the skill's level).

110050.name: Phoenix's Superb Fire Dance
110050.desc:
Every 10s: increases this ship's ACC and RLD by $1 for 5s and, with an 80.0% chance, fires a $2 torpedo barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).
Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 60.0%: decreases this ship's DMG taken by 10.0% and increases her EVA by $3 and FP and TRP by $4 until the battle ends.

110060.name: Fierce Sky Phoenix Flash+
110060.desc:
Every 25s: this ship stops in place for 3s and fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and performs a $2 Secret Ninja Art: Superb Phoenix Flash (DMG is based on the skill's level). 
When this ship stops in place as a result of this skill: deploys a barrier (lasts 3s) capable of blocking up to 3.0% of this ship's max HP in DMG; if this shield expires: performs a $3 special slash barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

110070.name: Blaze of Sacrifice
110070.desc: When this boat surfaces: fires a $1 special barrage I that inflicts a special Burn ailment for 6s to enemies hit (barrage DMG is based on the skill's level; special Burn DMG is based on this boat's TRP stat).

110080.name: Flaming Crimson
110080.desc: Increases this boat's TRP stat by $1. When this boat leaves the battle: fires a $2 special barrage II (DMG is based on the skill's level) and removes your fleet's non-special Burn ailments.

110090.name: Blaze of Sacrifice+
110090.desc:
5s after the battle starts: this boat surfaces and performs a $1 Secret Ninja Art: Charge, inflicting a special Burn ailment to enemies hit for 20s (Secret Ninja Art DMG is based on the skill's level; special Burn DMG is based on the boat's TRP stat).
While this boat performs this Secret Ninja Art: this boat recovers 10 OXY every second and the first 3 attacks that hit her have their DMG set to 1. This boat submerges after she has finished attacking, and will surface a second time when her OXY runs out.
While an enemy afflicted with the special Burn caused by this skill is afloat: increases this boat's Crit DMG by $2.

110100.name: Fan Dance of Ice and Snow
110100.desc: Increases this ship's AVI by $1. When this ship launches an airstrike: launches an additional $2 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level).

110110.name: Frozen Trees in Heavenly Storm
110110.desc: Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores $1 of this ship's max HP. When this ship's Detection Gauge value reaches 0: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

110120.name: Fan Dance of Ice and Snow+
110120.desc:
Increases this ship's AVI by $1. When this ship launches an airstrike: performs a $2 Secret Ninja Art: Performance - Ice Valley (DMG is based on the skill's level).
When this Secret Ninja Art hits an enemy: inflicts the Snow Dance ailment, reducing their SPD by 30.0% for 5s; if hitting an enemy already inflicted with Snow Dance: saves 1 stack (maximum of 5 stacks); 20.0% chance to set the enemy's SPD to 0 for 2s for each stack.

110130.name: Management Member's Pressure
110130.desc:
Decreases this ship's DMG taken by 8.0%. While this ship is afloat: increases your Vanguard's AA and RLD by $4 and increases your Flagship's DMG dealt by 5.0%.
Increases the DMG of this ship's first volley by $1. Increases this ship's DMG dealt to Heavy Armor enemies by $2. Enemies hit by this ship's Main Guns suffer $3 decreased FP, TRP, and AVI for 8s.

110140.name: Purple Ice Blast
110140.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit 5 times by this barrage suffer a special Armor Break ailment and take 5.0% increased airstrike DMG from your ships until the battle ends.

110150.name: Purple Ice Blast+
110150.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $2 chance to perform a $3 Secret Ninja Art: Purple Ice, Linked Fangs. Enemies hit 5 times by this Secret Ninja Art suffer a special Armor Break ailment and take 5.0% increased airstrike DMG from your ships until the battle ends.

110160.name: Bebeby, Hide Me!
110160.desc: Increases this ship's max Detection Gauge value by 15 and increases her AA and AVI by $1. 20s after the battle starts: designates 1 random enemy; restores $2 of this ship's max HP when that enemy is defeated.

110170.name: Root of Calamity Storm
110170.desc: While this ship is afloat, when your Main Fleet has been attacked 5 times: this ship gains 1 Root of Calamity's Wrath (does not stack); when this ship launches an airstrike: expends the stack and fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

110180.name: Root of Calamity Storm+
110180.desc: Decreases the loading time of this ship's first airstrike by 45.0%. While this ship is afloat, when your Main Fleet has been attacked 5 times: this ship gains 1 Root of Calamity's Wrath (does not stack); when this ship launches an airstrike: expends the stack and performs a $1 Secret Ninja Art: Someone, Save Me (DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit by this Secret Ninja Art are Poisoned for 20s, inflicting 105 DMG to them every second.

110190.name: Soul of Tohno

110200.name: Enka Tuypa
110200.desc: Increases this ship's ACC by $1. Every 4 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires this ship's Main Guns again as well as a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

110210.name: Soul of Tohno+

110220.name: New Link Chance!
110220.desc: 彩蛋效果占用，描述不需要本地化（战斗开始后5秒，若队伍中全部都为携带了特殊兵装的闪乱神乐角色，旗舰触发一轮特殊弹幕(威力依据防空属性，箱子数量随机2~7)）

110310.name: Twin Blades - Two-Sided Winding Flash
110310.desc: In battle, increases this ship's LCK by 9 and decreases her DMG taken by 10.0%.

110320.name: Sword Draw - Phoenix's Flashing Flight
110320.desc: Increases this ship's LCK by 6. Every 20s: decreases the FP, TRP, and AVI of a random enemy by 5.0% for 5s.

110330.name: Six Swords - Homura the Pioneer
110330.desc: Increases this boat's LCK by 12 and Torpedo Crit Rate by 10.0%.

110340.name: Folding Fan - Frosty Sleeves Snow Dance
110340.desc: Increases this ship's LCK by 7 and increases her ACC and RLD by 15.0%.

110350.name: Feather Fan - Purple Ice Linked Blossoms
110350.desc: Increases this ship's LCK by 4. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: increases this ship's FP by 10.0% until the battle ends.

110360.name: Shuriken - Full Moon Hidden in Shade
110360.desc: Decreases(?) this ship's LCK by 6 and increases her AVI by 5.0% and EVA by 10.0%.

110370.name: Tachis - Hankane
110370.desc: Increases this ship's LCK by 9. When this ship's Main or Secondary Gun hits an enemy: 10.0% chance to decrease that enemy's DMG dealt by 5.0% for 5s (10s cooldown between activations).

111010.name: Go Go Vacuum-Kun!
111010.desc: Increases this ship's EVA by $1. Every 4 times this ship fires her Main Guns: summons Go Go Vacuum-kun, decreasing this ship's DMG taken by $2 for 8s. Go Go Vacuum-kun draws in nearby enemies; affected enemies have their FP, TRP, and AA decreased by 5.0% for 8s.

111020.name: Almighty Fighting Inventorator!
111020.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. Every 20s after the battle starts: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and decreases the AA by $3 and ACC by $4 for 8s for all on-field enemies at the time of activation. 3s after this effect activates: decreases this ship's AA by 1.0% for 1s.

111030.name: Almighty Fighting Inventorator!+
111030.desc: Increases this ship's FP and ACC by $1. Every 20s after the battle starts: fires an improved $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) and decreases the AA by $3 and ACC by $4 for 8s for all on-field enemies at the time of activation. 3s after this effect activates: decreases this ship's AA by 1.0% for 1s.

111040.name: Alien Animal Friend
111040.desc: Increases this ship's TRP and ACC by $1. Every 10 times this ship fires her Main Guns: summons an alien animal friend and fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit by this special barrage take 10.0% more torpedo DMG from this ship.

111050.name: Overpowering Will
111050.desc: When this ship is attacked: $1 chance to increase this ship's Evasion Rate by $2 for 5s (8s cooldown between activations). Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 30.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores $3 of this ship's max HP and increases her EVA by $4 until the battle ends.

111060.name: Alien Animal Friend+
111060.desc: Increases this ship's TRP and ACC by $1. Every 10 times this ship fires her Main Guns: summons an alien animal friend and fires a $2 special barrage (improved; DMG is based on the skill's level). Enemies hit by this special barrage take 10.0% more torpedo DMG from this ship.

111070.name: Alien Plant Friend
111070.desc: Increases this ship's FP by $1. Every 8 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). When the battle starts, and every 20s: summons an alien plant friend. The alien plant friend persists on the field for 15s and attacks enemies using its own equipment; its stats change based on Momo's stats and the skill's level.

111080.name: Alien Plant Friend+
111080.desc: Increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1. Every 8 times this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (improved; DMG is based on the skill's level). When the battle starts, and every 20s: summons an alien plant friend. The alien plant friend persists on the field for 15s and attacks enemies using its own equipment; its stats change based on Momo's stats and the skill's level. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below $3 as a result of DMG taken: fires a $2 special barrage (improved; DMG is based on the skill's level).

111090.name: Secret Schemes
111090.desc:
Decreases this ship's DMG taken by $1. If this ship is the frontmost ship of your Vanguard: increases this ship's AA and EVA by $1; if NOT the frontmost ship, increases RLD and ACC by $1.
When the battle starts, and every 10s: picks one random other ally without the Plan Execution status and increases their EVA by $2 for 8s, then gives that ally the Plan Execution status afterward.
Every 20s: for 10s, increases your fleet's DMG dealt by $2 and grants Momo and all allies with the Plan Execution status the following buffs:
1) If the recipient is in your Vanguard, restores $3 of the recipient's max HP and increases her FP and TRP by $2;
2) If the recipient is in your Main Fleet: restores $3 of the recipient's max HP and increases her FP and AVI by $2.

111130.name: Love Concealed
111130.desc: When the battle starts: marks the ally (excluding this ship) with the lowest current HP percentage and restores 5.0% of her max HP. The recipient of this effect has her DMG taken decreased by $1 until the battle ends and, once per battle, if her HP falls below 20.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores $2 of the recipient's HP. When a recipient of this skill receives healing from any source other than this skill: removes the mark.

111140.name: Love Concealed+
111140.desc: When the battle starts: marks the ally (excluding this ship) with the lowest current HP percentage and restores 5.0% of her max HP. The recipient of this effect has her DMG taken decreased by $1 until the battle ends and, once per battle, if her HP falls below 20.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores $2 of the recipient's HP. Once per battle, when a recipient of this skill receives healing from any source other than this skill: increases the recipient's DMG dealt by 5.0%.

111150.name: Be Still, My Heart!
111150.desc:
When this ship fires her Main Guns: $1 chance to fire a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). 
Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below 80.0% as a result of DMG taken, or when an enemy gets within 80 units of this ship, this ship gains the following buffs until the battle ends: 
1) Decreases the loading time of this ship's Main Guns by 20.0%, decreases her Main Guns' DMG dealt by 10.0%, and increases the activation chance of the above special barrage by 30.0%;
2) When this ship fires her Main Guns: throws an emergency fire extinguisher that inflicts Armor Break on the enemy hit.

111160.name: Scandalous!
111160.desc: Every $1s: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If the ruler shells from this barrage hit the same enemy 3 times: inflicts Armor Break to that enemy and increases their aircraft DMG taken by 5.0% until the battle ends; when the handcuff shells from this barrage hit an enemy: decreases that enemy's SPD by 15.0% for 3s.

111170.name: Scandalous!+
111170.desc: Every $1s: $2 chance to fire a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). If the ruler shells from this barrage hit the same enemy 3 times: inflicts Armor Break to that enemy and increases their aircraft DMG taken by 5.0% until the battle ends; when the handcuff shells from this barrage hit an enemy: decreases that enemy's SPD by 15.0% for 3s. When this skill has inflicted Armor Break 3 times or more: increases this ship's AVI by $4 until the battle ends.

111180.name: Overbearing Outside, Softie Inside
111180.desc: Increases this ship's AA by $1 and decreases your Vanguard's DMG taken by $2. When any other ship in your fleet is attacked: 30.0% chance to launch a $3 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level; 20s cooldown between activations).

111200.name: Deviluke Royal Might
111200.desc: Every 15s: fires a special beam. If Nana Astar Deviluke or Momo Belia Deviluke are in your fleet: improves the special beam.

111210.name: Deviluke Royal Might
111210.desc: Every 18s: fires a special beam. If Lala Satalin Deviluke or Momo Belia Deviluke are in your fleet: improves the special beam.

111220.name: Deviluke Royal Might
111220.desc: Every 20s: fires a special beam. If Lala Satalin Deviluke or Nana Astar Deviluke are in your fleet: improves the special beam.

111100.name: Armament Swap

111110.name: Armament Swap+

111120.name: I Love Taiyaki!

111240.name: This Way, Girls!
111240.desc: Every 20s: uses an emergency fire extinguisher and deploys a smokescreen that extinguishes regular Burn ailments for all your ships in it. Smokescreen lasts 5s.

111270.name: Restore Discipline!
111270.desc: Increases your Vanguard's EVA and FP by 5.0% until the battle ends.

112010.name: Transcend Worlds - Limit Released
112010.desc: Increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1. When this ship finishes loading her Main Guns: $4 chance to enter the Limit Released state, increasing her FP, ACC, and RLD by $2 for 10s. When this ship fires her Main Guns: increases this ship's Main Gun Crit Rate by $2 for 5s and, if this ship is in the Limit Released state, fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

112020.name: Transcend Worlds - Limit Released+
112020.desc: Increases this ship's Main Gun efficiency by $1. When this ship finishes loading her Main Guns: this ship enters the Limit Released state, increasing her FP, ACC, and RLD by $2 for 10s. When this ship fires her Main Guns: increases this ship's Main Gun Crit Rate by $1 for 5s and fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level). Every even-numbered time this ship fires her Main Guns: additionally fires a $3 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

112030.name: Heart of Faith
112030.desc: When this ship is NOT in the Limit Released state: increases this ship's AA by $1 and decreases her DMG taken by $1. When this ship is in the Limit Released state: increases this ship's EVA and Evasion Rate by $1 and increases her DMG dealt and DMG taken by $2. Once per battle, when this ship's HP falls below $3 as a result of DMG taken: restores 15.0% of this ship's max HP and this ship enters the Limit Released state.

112040.name: ★Rock Fire
112040.desc: The first time this ship fires a Main Gun salvo in a battle: increases this ship's Main Gun Crit DMG by 15.0% until the battle ends.

112050.name: Death's Domain - Imprisoning Chains
112050.desc: Increases this ship's AVI and ACC by $1. Every 20s: launches a $2 special airstrike (DMG is based on the skill's level) that decreases the SPD of enemies hit by 15.0% for 10s.

112060.name: Trial of Death
112060.desc: During battle, when this ship's HP is below 50.0%: increases this ship's AVI by $1. Every 10s: fires a $3 special barrage I (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by barrage I's scythe-shaped shells take $2 more DMG from this ship for 5s.

112070.name: Trial of Death+
112070.desc: During battle, when this ship's HP is below 70.0%: increases this ship's AVI by $1. Every 10s: fires a $3 special barrage I (DMG is based on the skill's level); enemies hit by barrage I's scythe-shaped shells take $2 more DMG from this ship for 5s. Every 20s: fires a $3 special barrage II (DMG is based on the skill's level) that decreases the SPD of enemies hit by 15.0% for 10s. Once per battle, when this ship takes DMG that would sink her: this ship does not sink, and for $4s, she evades all attacks.

112080.name: Dead Reaping
112080.desc: The first time this ship launches an airstrike in a battle: increases this ship's RLD by 15.0% until the battle ends.

112090.name: Alchemy of Taboo and Hope
112090.desc: Every 10s: randomly selects and activates 1 random effect among this ship's equipped Items and performs a $1 Snipe attack against a random enemy (DMG is based on the skill's level); if there is an enemy within 65 units of this ship when this effect activates, instead performs $1 Rapid Fire against the closest enemy to this ship (DMG is based on the skill's level) and inflicts Armor Break on the enemy hit.

112100.name: The Alchemist of Memories
112100.desc: Increases this ship's AVI and ACC by $1. When this ship launches an airstrike or performs a special attack: gains 1 stack of Mana Flow (can be stacked up to 10 times); when the effect of an Atelier Yumia collab character's equipped Item activates: spends 1 stack of Mana Flow and improves that Item's effect. When this ship performs a special attack: synthesizes ammunition for the special attack based on the Armor Type of the target.

112110.name: One Step Toward Tomorrow
112110.desc:
Every 5s: uses $1 Piercing Arts or Strike Arts against a random enemy (DMG is based on the skill's level). When the effect of an Atelier Yumia collab character's equipped Item activates: accumulates 25.0% Environmental Mana.
When Environmental Mana is at 50.0% or higher, or when this ship is in the Mana Surge status: every time this ship performs a special attack, additionally performs Synthesize (improves the special attack and gains 1 stack of Mana Flow).

112130.name: One Step Toward Tomorrow+
112130.desc:
Every 5s: uses $1 Piercing Arts or Strike Arts against a random enemy (DMG is based on the skill's level). When the effect of an Atelier Yumia collab character's equipped Item activates: accumulates 25.0% Environmental Mana.
When Environmental Mana is at 50.0% or higher, or when this ship is in the Mana Surge status: every time this ship performs a special attack, additionally performs Synthesize (improves the special attack and gains 1 stack of Mana Flow).
When this ship launches an airstrike while in the Mana Surge status: additionally spends all stacks of Mana Flow and activates a $1 Maximized Mana Surge - Requiem Trigger (DMG is based on the skill's level and the number of Mana Flow stacks consumed; pattern is based on the number of Mana Flow stacks consumed), then dispells the Mana Surge status on this ship.

112150.name: Time Compression
112150.desc: When the effect of Yumia Liessfeldt's equipped Item activates: decreases the time until all of this ship's next special attacks by 2s.

112180.name: Welleks's Assault
112180.desc: Increases this ship's RLD and ACC by $1. Every 10 times this ship fires her Main Guns, if there is an enemy within 30 units of this ship: performs a $2 Spinning Edge attack (DMG is based on the skill's level); if there is no such enemy, instead performs a $2 Wide Slash attack (DMG is based on the skill's level).

112190.name: Pride of the Welleks's
112190.desc:
When this ship fires her Main Guns: accumulates 2.0% Environmental Mana; when this ship fires her Main Guns with 10.0% or more Environmental Mana: spends 10.0% Environmental Mana and gains 1 stack of Throwing Dagger (can be stacked up to 5 times).
Increases this ship's FP, TRP, and EVA by $1 for each stack of Throwing Dagger this ship has. Every 20s, when this ship is in the Mana Surge status: spends all stacks of Throwing Dagger to activate a $2 Maximized Mana Surge - Lionhearted (DMG is based on the skill's level), dispels the Mana Surge status, and, for 15s, increases this ship's DMG dealt to enemies below 10.0% HP by $3.

112200.name: Pride of the Welleks's+
112200.desc:
When this ship fires her Main Guns: accumulates 2.0% Environmental Mana; when this ship fires her Main Guns with 10.0% or more Environmental Mana: spends 10.0% Environmental Mana and gains 1 stack of Throwing Dagger (can be stacked up to 5 times).
Increases this ship's FP, TRP, and EVA by $1 for each stack of Throwing Dagger she has. Every 20s, when this ship is in the Mana Surge status: spends all stacks of Throwing Dagger to activate a $2 Maximized Mana Surge - Lionhearted (DMG is based on the skill's level), dispels the Mana Surge status, and, for 15s, increases this ship's DMG dealt to enemies below 30.0% HP by $3; gains 1 stack of Throwing Dagger for each enemy sunk during this effect's duration.

112210.name: Hellion Mantis
112210.desc: When the battle starts: gains 3 stacks of Throwing Dagger. During battle, decreases this ship's DMG taken by 5.0%. When this ship sinks an enemy: increases this ship's RLD by 3.0% (can be stacked up to 5 times).

112220.name: Blazing Trigger
112220.desc: Increases this ship's FP by $1. Every 5s, or when this ship's Main Guns finish loading: accumulates 10.0% Environmental Mana. When this ship fires her Main Guns: $3 chance to fire a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); if there is an enemy within 65 units when this effect activates: changes the barrage fired. Every 20s: fires a powerful $2 slashing barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

112230.name: Mercenary's Combat Techniques
112230.desc: Every time this ship's Main Guns finish loading: gains 2 stacks of Battle Rate (can be stacked up to 10 times). Increases this ship's ACC and Main Gun Crit Rate by $1 for every stack of Battle Rate she has. When this ship has 5 or more stacks of Battle Rate: multiplies the Environmental Mana accumulated by the skill Blazing Trigger by 1.5. When another ship in your fleet scores a hit with her Main Guns or Secondary Guns: $2 chance for Nina to additionally gain 1 stack of Battle Rate; if said ship is an Atelier Yumia collab character, the action chance of this effect increases to $3.

112240.name: Blazing Trigger+
112240.desc: Increases this ship's FP and RLD by $1. Every 5s, or when this ship's Main Guns finish loading: accumulates 10.0% Environmental Mana. When this ship fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); if there is an enemy within 65 units when this effect activates: changes the barrage fired. Every 20s: fires a powerful $2 slashing barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level); when this barrage fires, if this ship is in the Mana Surge status: instead activates a $2 Maximized Mana Surge - Zero Chance (DMG is based on the skill's level), then dispells the Mana Surge status on this ship.

112250.name: Unlimited Stamina
112250.desc: Increases this ship's DMG dealt by 1.0% for each stack of Battle Rate she has.

112260.name: 优米雅阵营环境玛那技能

112270.name: Knights Can Be Maidens Too
112270.desc:
Increases this ship's FP by $1. Every 5s: fires a $2 special barrage and accumulates 15.0% Environmental Mana (DMG is based on the skill's level); if there is no enemy within 35 units of this ship when firing, the barrage fired is changed.
Inflicts 3 stacks of Break Symbol on all the enemies on the battlefield; when this ship's special barrage or Maximized Mana Surge hits an enemy: removes 1 stack of Break Symbol from the enemy; when an enemy's Break Symbol stack is reduced to 0: inflicts a special Armor Break status on that enemy for 3s, after which the enemy's Break Symbol stack is reset to 3.

112280.name: Alber's Assistance
112280.desc: Every 3 times this ship fires her Main Guns: gains 1 stack of Alber's Assistance (can be stacked up to 3 times); increases this ship's FP by $1 for each stack of Alber's Assistance she has. When the Alber's Assistance stack reaches 3: activates a $2 special attack, Isolation (DMG is based on the skill's level), and resets the stack to 0 after 2s.

112290.name: Alber's Assistance+
112290.desc: Every 3 times this ship fires her Main Guns: gains 1 stack of Alber's Assistance (can be stacked up to 3 times); increases this ship's FP and TRP by $1 for each stack of Alber's Assistance she has. When the Alber's Assistance stack reaches 3: activates a $2 special attack, Isolation (DMG is based on the skill's level), and resets the stack to 0 after 2s. When this ship is in the Mana Surge status: instead of Isolation, activates a $3 Maximized Mana Surge - Heartbreaker (DMG is based on the skill's level) and dispels the Mana Surge status.

112300.name: Open Wounds
112300.desc: When activating the special attack Isolation or Maximized Mana Surge - Heartbreaker, decreases the reload time of this ship's currently loading torpedoes by 2s.

114100.name: Astraea Record

114110.name: Luminous Wind
114110.desc:
Increases this ship's FP by $1. 
Every 10s after the battle starts: performs the $2 special attack Luminous Wind (DMG is based on the skill's level); when performing this attack, if there is an enemy within 45 units of this ship, additionally performs the $3 special attack Luvia (DMG is based on the skill's level; prioritizes humanoid enemies).

114120.name: Luminous Wind+
114120.desc:
Increases this ship's FP by $1. 
Every 10s after the battle starts: performs the $2 special attack Luminous Wind+ (DMG is based on the skill's level; improves the attack if there are 2 or more enemies present); when performing this attack, if there is an enemy within 45 units of this ship, additionally performs the $3 special attack Luvia+ (DMG is based on the skill's level; prioritizes humanoid enemies).

114129.name: Alf's Justitia
114129.desc: 10s after the battle starts: increases this ship's ACC by 15.0% until the battle ends.

114010.name: Falna
114010.desc: When the battle starts, and every 20s: for 6s, increases your Vanguard's FP and TRP by $1 and increases your Vanguard's and Main Fleet's DMG dealt by $2. When this buff ends, all your ships recover 1.0% of their max HP.

114020.name: Dios Aedes Vesta
114020.desc: Every 20s after the battle starts: activates Dios Aedes Vesta; extinguishes any active Burns (excluding special Burns) your Vanguard is afflicted with, recovers 1.0% of your Vanguard's max HP every 1s for 3s, and fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) from a random Vanguard ship with a $2 chance to decrease the EVA of enemies hit by $3 for 5s.

114030.name: Dios Aedes Vesta+
114030.desc: Every 20s after the battle starts: activates Dios Aedes Vesta+; extinguishes any active Burns (excluding special Burns) your Vanguard is afflicted with, recovers 1.0% of your Vanguard's max HP every 1s for 5s, and fires a $1 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) from a random Vanguard ship that decreases the EVA of enemies hit by $2 for 5s.

114040.name: Hestia's String
114040.desc: When the battle starts, decreases your Vanguard's DMG taken by 5.0% for 30s.

115010.name: Halvanhelev
115010.desc: When the battle starts, increase this unit's RLD by $1. Every 2 times this unit fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) that decreases the SPD of enemies hit by 5.0% for 3s (does not stack with similar skills).

115020.name: Astral Dress - Adonai Melek
115020.desc:
When the battle starts, and every 30s: deploys a shield (lasting 20s; can negate up to 8 enemy shells) around this unit; if this shield is destroyed during its active duration: immediately performs a $1 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level) and increases this unit's EVA by $2 for 10s.
While this unit is afloat: decreases your Flagship's DMG taken by $3.

115030.name: Halvanhelev+
115030.desc:
When the battle starts, increase this unit's FP and RLD by $1. Every 2 times this unit fires her Main Guns: fires a $2 special barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level) that decreases the SPD of enemies hit by 1.0% for 3s (does not stack with similar skills).
Additionally, whenever this unit takes a total amount of DMG equal to 20.0% of her max HP: performs a $2 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level).

115040.name: Sandalphon
115040.desc: During battle, decreases this unit's DMG taken by 8.0%. During battle, every time this unit sinks an enemy: increases this unit's Crit Rate by 8.0% until the battle ends (can be stacked up to 3 times).

115050.name: Astral Dress - Elohim Gibor
115050.desc:
When this unit fires her Main Guns: activates an effect corresponding to which of the following modes Angel Camael is in (the mode switches every time the Main Guns are fired):
1) Camael: fires a $1 special barrage, then Camael performs an additional $1 special attack (DMG of both attacks is based on the skill's level). Camael starts the battle in this mode.
2): Megiddo: fires a $1 powerful barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).
When Camael or Megiddo performs either the special attack or the powerful barrage: inflicts a special Burn to enemies hit by the attack for 10s, inflicting DMG once every second (DMG is based on this unit's FP stat).

115060.name: Efreet's Might
115060.desc: During battle, decreases this unit's Burn DMG taken by $1 and decreases the duration of Burns on her by 3s. When an enemy gets within a certain range of this unit: decreases this unit's DMG taken by $2 for 10s (20s cooldown between activations). Once per battle, when this unit takes DMG that would incapacitate her: this unit does not get incapacitated and evades all DMG for 10s.

115070.name: Efreet's Might+
115070.desc: When the battle starts: increases this unit's FP and ACC by $1. During battle, decreases this unit's Burn DMG taken by $1 and decreases the duration of Burns on her by 3s. When this unit takes DMG, or when an enemy gets within a certain range of her: decreases this unit's DMG taken by $2 and increases her AA by $2 for 10s (20s cooldown between activations). Once per battle, when this unit takes DMG that would incapacitate her: this unit does not get incapacitated, she evades all DMG for 10s, and she recovers $3 of her max HP.

115080.name: Camael
115080.desc: During battle, when this unit's HP falls below 70.0%: restores 2.0% of this unit's max HP every 5s.

115090.name: El Kanaph
115090.desc:
Every 8s after the battle starts: performs a $1 special attack using either Constrictor or Piercer (the first attack performed will be Constrictor and then switches after each special attack; DMG is based on the skill's level).
Every time Constrictor and Piercer have each been used once: 3s later, performs a $1 special attack using Sky Rider (DMG is based on the skill's level).

115100.name: Astral Dress - Elohim Sabaoth
115100.desc: When the battle starts: increases this unit's FP, TRP, and Main Gun efficiency by $1 and deploys a barrier (lasting 20s) that can negate DMG equal to 5.0% of this unit's max HP. If this shield is destroyed, or if its active duration runs out: increases this unit's EVA by $2 and RLD and ACC by $1 until the battle ends.

115110.name: El Kanaph+

115120.name: Raphael
115120.desc: Every 30s after the battle starts: decreases the SPD of all enemies on the battlefield by 10.0% for 5s.

115130.name: Zafkiel
115130.desc: During battle, adds an exclusive Augment Module. The Augment Module deals guaranteed Critical Damage against enemies with 0 SPD.

115140.name: Time-Eating Castle

115150.name: Astral Dress - Elohim
115150.desc:
When the battle starts: creates a Clone on the battlefield. Every 5s: spend 5 stacks of Time to create another Clone; if the Time stack is insufficient, no Clone will be created; up to 3 Clones may exist at the same time.
Clones inherit the current HP value Kurumi Tokisaki had at the time of creation, assist in battle, and perform attacks using a $1 Augment Module.
When a Clone is destroyed, Kurumi Tokisaki recovers 2.0% of her max HP.
When Kurumi Tokisaki takes DMG that would defeat her, if she has a Clone present, she recovers the Clone with the highest HP and restores HP equal to $2 of the Clone's HP.

115160.name: Astral Dress - Elohim+
115160.desc:
When the battle starts: creates a Clone on the battlefield. Every 5s: spend 5 stacks of Time to create another Clone; if the Time stack is insufficient, no Clone will be created; up to 3 Clones may exist at the same time.
Clones inherit the current HP value Kurumi Tokisaki had at the time of creation, assist in battle, and perform attacks using a $1 Augment Module.
When a Clone takes DMG, this Clone evades all shelling and ramming DMG for 0.5s.
When a Clone is destroyed, Kurumi Tokisaki recovers 2.0% of her max HP.
When Kurumi Tokisaki takes DMG that would defeat her, if she has a Clone present, she recovers the Clone with the highest HP and restores HP equal to $2 of the Clone's HP.
When the battle ends, for each Clone on the battlefield, Kurumi Tokisaki gains 5 stacks of Time, then spends all her stacks of Time to recover 5.0% of her max HP for every 5 stacks spent.

115170.name: Metatron - Kadour
115170.desc:
When this unit launches an airstrike: increases this unit's DMG dealt by $1 for 8s and activates a $2 Metatron - Kadour (DMG is based on the skill's level); Metatron - Kadour decreases the AA and EVA of enemies hit by 3.0% for 8s.
10s after the battle starts, and every 20s after that: launches a $2 aerial barrage (DMG is based on the skill's level).

115180.name: Metatron - Artelif
115180.desc: When the battle starts: increases this unit's AVI and ACC by $1. Every 20s after the battle starts: activates a $2 Metatron - Artelif (DMG is based on the skill's level).

115190.name: Astral Dress - Ehyeh
115190.desc: During battle, decreases this unit's first $1 instance(s) of DMG taken by $2. Once per battle, when this unit's HP falls below 50.0% as a result of DMG taken: restores $3 of this unit's HP and sets her Detection Gauge value to 0.

115200.name: Astral Dress - El
115200.desc: When the battle starts: increases this unit's AVI and ACC by $1. Every 10s after the battle starts: $2 chance to summon Zadkiel and perform a $3 special attack (DMG is based on the skill's level) that decreases the SPD of enemies hit by $4 for 6s.

115210.name: Astral Dress - El+
